一旦你对纯 Javascript 有了很好的理解，下一步就是选择一个前端框架。 我会在可能的情况下继续更新这个基本列表。 将此文章添加到您的书签中，这样您就可以随时准备好它。 :) :)



原文:

Javascript is a beginner friendly programming language that lets you add interactivity to your website. It is the most fun and useful programming language to learn. It can be used to do many different things like building websites, apps, servers and much more.

Due to its immense popularity it’s one of the most sought after skills in the tech industry today. If you want to become a Javascript Developer and build exciting things for the web then you are in the right place because I have pulled together a list of free resources for you to learn Javascript.

1) Scrimba: 7 Hour interactive course on Javascript - Link

This beginner’s tutorial taught by the founder of Scrimba offers 140+ coding challenges and 3 unique projects to help you solidify your Javascript knowledge. Once you are done, you will feel confident enough to pick up any front end framework of your choice. The only prerequisite before taking this course, you should have a basic understanding of HTML and CSS.

2) FreeCodeCamps: Javascript Algorithm and Data Structures - Link

One of the originals and still one of the best, FCC continues to expand its most excellent range of free courses and this Javascript course is one of them. With the help of this course you will learn the fundamentals of Javascript including variables, arrays, objects, loops and functions. Along the way you will also learn how to create algorithms to become a better problem solver.

3) WES BOS: Javascript30 - Link

A super helpful resource to take you from a beginner to intermediate Javascript Developer. This course does exactly what it says; helps you learn Javascript by building 30 projects in 30 days while talking about the hows, the whys and the whats that you will use to solve problems.

4) Ania Kubów: Learn Javascript by building 7 Games - Link

It is hard to believe this video course is available for free on youtube. When you learn by building projects, you learn better and when you learn by building games you learn 10 times better. By the end of this course you will have enough skills and Javascript knowledge to build projects on your own.

5) Traversy Media: Javascript Playlist - Link

I think Traversy Media is worth a mention, not just for its vast selection of free Javascript courses but also for its quality content. This youtube channel’s Javascript playlist offers almost everything you will need to become a Javascript Pro. It is one of the best Javascript resources for you to learn and become a Javascript Developer.

Conclusion

Once you have got a good understanding of plain Javascript, the next step is to pick up a front end framework. React, Vue and Angular are some popular Javascript frameworks to learn to become a better Javascript Developer.

I will keep updating this essential list as and when I can. Add this article to your bookmarks, so you can alway have it ready. :)
item.author: judis07

item.title: 了解空间流程管道 | UNDERSTAND SPACY PROCESS PIPELINES
item.description:
猜猜你很想知道 spaCy 的能力，别担心在这篇文章中你会明白的。

图片来自 memegenerator.net

文本分类： spaCy 可用于对各种类别的文本进行分类或为整个文档甚至部分文档分配标签。

命名实体识别： spaCy 功能可用于从大型文档中提取实体并命名真实世界的对象，如人、位置、组织等

但这可以用于恢复特定角色的关键字提取，具体取决于招聘人员对候选人的要求。

标记化：处理非结构化文本数据时最常见的任务之一。 我可以说是将短语、句子、段落或整个文本文档拆分为更小的单元（例如单个单词或术语）的过程。 这些较小的单元中的每一个都称为令牌。

词形还原：指使用词汇和词的形态分析正确地做事，通常旨在仅删除屈折词尾并返回单词的基本形式或字典形式。

相似性： spaCy 可用于比较文档、单词和文本的相似性。 例如，您可以使用 spaCy 构建一个能够检查组织中文档之间相似性的工具。

基于规则的匹配： spaCy 能够根据其文本和语言注释找到标记的序列/模式，类似于正则表达式。

大多数 spaCy 功能可以帮助执行大规模文本分析，有关 spaCy 功能和功能的更多信息，请查看此。

但本文的主题是 spaCy 的流程管道让我们深入研究一下

管道包的大小、速度、内存使用、准确性和它们包含的数据可能不同。 您选择的包始终取决于您的用例和您正在使用的文本。

每当调用 nlp 函数时，它都会通过标记文本将文本转换为Doc对象。 然后是一系列应用于Doc的管道组件，以便对其进行处理和设置属性。

此管道的最终输出是处理后的Doc 。

然后在几个不同的步骤中处理 Doc。

这些组件可以根据用例进行修改。

一些 spaCy 组件及其描述：

  • 标记器 - 用于将文本分割成标记
  • 标注器- 词性标注器
  • 处理管道的能力始终取决于组件、它们的模型以及它们的训练方式。 每个 spaCy 管道都有两个属性：

    1. 管道名称
    2. 管道（名称，组件）

    可以通过检查管道来查看spaCy管道属性

    # import spacy import spacy # Load the en_core_web_sm pipeline nlp = spacy.load("en_core_web_sm") # Print the names of the pipeline components print("pipeline name", nlp.pipe_names) print("============================================================================") # Print the full pipeline of (name, component) tuples print("pipeline tuples", nlp.pipeline)

    输出

    pipeline name ['tok2vec', 'tagger', 'parser', 'attribute_ruler', 'lemmatizer', 'ner'] ============================================================================ pipeline tuples [('tok2vec', <spacy.pipeline.tok2vec.Tok2Vec object at 0x7fd65b7407d0>), ('tagger', <spacy.pipeline.tagger.Tagger object at 0x7fd65b78c650>), ('parser', <spacy.pipeline.dep_parser.DependencyParser object at 0x7fd65ba55b40>), ('attribute_ruler', <spacy.pipeline.attributeruler.AttributeRuler object at 0x7fd65b70b3c0>), ('lemmatizer', <spacy.lang.en.lemmatizer.EnglishLemmatizer object at 0x7fd65b6c6500>), ('ner', <spacy.pipeline.ner.EntityRecognizer object at 0x7fd65ba55de0>)]

    根据令牌及其属性计算您自己的值

  • 添加命名实体，例如，基于字典

    • 让我们看看如何应用自定义组件

    第一步是使用函数定义自定义组件，然后在 spaCy 管道上添加自定义组件。

    在 spaCy 管道中添加数字提取器组件怎么样？ 是的，让我们去做吧。

    首先，让我们定义一个用于从文档中提取数字的组件作为一个名为digit_component_function的函数

    最后的任务是在 spaCy 管道中添加digit_component_function 。

    以下是在 spaCy 中添加自定义数字组件的完整代码

    # import spaCy import spacy from spacy.language import Language # Define the custom component @Language.component("digit_component") def digit_component_function(doc): # convert object to string txt = str(doc) # extract digits from the string print("This document contain the following digits:",[int(s) for s in txt.split() if s.isdigit()]) # Return the doc return doc # Load the small English pipeline nlp = spacy.load("en_core_web_sm") # Add the component first in the pipeline and print the pipe names nlp.add_pipe("digit_component", first=True) print(nlp.pipe_names) # Process a text text = "XLnet outperforms BERT on 20 tasks, often by a large margin. The new model achieves state-of-the-art performance on 18 NLP tasks including question answering,natural language inference, sentiment analysis,etc" doc = nlp(text)

    输出

    'digit_component', 'tok2vec', 'tagger', 'parser', 'attribute_ruler', 'lemmatizer', 'ner'] This document contain the following digits: [20, 18]

    属性扩展——设置一个可以被覆盖的默认值

  • 属性扩展——像 Python 中的属性一样工作。 定义一个getter和一个可选的setter函数

    • 自定义属性可通过 ._ 属性获得。 这样做是为了将它们与内置属性区分开来。 需要使用set_extension方法向Doc 、 Token或Span类注册属性。

    让我们尝试为我们所居住的国家/地区扩展我们自己的属性。使用set_extension方法我们应该添加is_country属性。 然后我们可以检查我们使用 _.attributename 添加的属性。

     # import spacy import spacy from spacy.tokens import Token nlp = spacy.blank("en") # Register the Token extension attribute "is_country" with the default value False Token.set_extension("is_country", default=False) # Process the text and set the is_country attribute to True for the token "Tanzania" doc = nlp("I live in Tanzania.") doc[3]._.is_country = True # Print the token text and the is_country attribute for all tokens print([(token.text, token._.is_country) for token in doc])

    输出

    [('I', False), ('live', False), ('in', False), ('Tanzania', True), ('.', False)]

    哇！ 现在您已经熟悉了如何使用 spaCy 管道，您可以通过查看具有扩展、实体提取、缩放和性能、选择性处理等的组件来选择更进一步

    感谢您参与阅读本文，请与社区分享。



原文:

spaCy is a free, open-source popular python library for advanced Natural Language Processing.

Guess you are curious to know about what spaCy is capable of, don't worry in this article you will understand about that.

image by memegenerator.net

spaCy Capabilities and Features

Text Classification: spaCy can be used in classifying text on various categories or assigning labels to the whole document or even part of the document.

Named Entity Recognition: spaCy capable can be used in the extraction of entities from large documents and naming real-world objects like person, locations, organization, etc

but this can be applied to resume keywords extraction on the specific role depending on what a recruiter wants from candidates.

Tokenization: one of the most common tasks when it comes to working with unstructured text data. I can say is the process of splitting a phrase, sentence, paragraph, or an entire text document into smaller units, such as individual words or terms. Each of these smaller units is called a token.

spaCy can segment text, words, punctuations, etc

Lemmatization: refers to doing things properly with the use of a vocabulary and morphological analysis of words, normally aiming to remove inflectional endings only and to return the base or dictionary form of a word.

spaCy can assign the base form of words like the lemma of "running" is "run", "jumped" is "jump", and the lemma of “writing” is “write”.

Similarity: spaCy can be used on comparison of documents, words, and texts similarity. For example, you can build a tool capable of checking similarities between documents in your organization with spaCy.

Rule-based Matching: spaCy capable of finding sequences/patterns of tokens based on their texts and linguistic annotations, similar to regular expressions.

Most of the spaCy features can help in performing large-scale text analysis, for more about spaCy features and capabilities take a look at this.

But the main topic of this article is process pipelines of spaCy let's dive into this

spaCy Process Pipelines

spaCy currently offers trained pipelines for a variety of languages, which can be installed as individual Python modules. Pipeline packages can differ in size, speed, memory usage, accuracy, and the data they include. The package you choose always depends on your use case and the texts you’re working with.

spaCy has the nlp() function which is always invoked with text arguments or parameters.

text = "My article about spaCy"
doc = nlp(text)

whenever the nlp function is invoked, it transforms text into a Doc object by tokenizing the text. Then followed by the series of pipeline components that applied to the Doc in order to process it and set attributes.

The final output of this pipeline is the processed Doc.

spaCy pipeline process starts by involving the nlp function on a text, spaCy tokenizes the text to produce a Doc object. The Doc is then processed in several different steps.

spaCy pipeline

spaCy Pipeline Components: spaCy has built-in components which used to perform processing tasks whenever the nlp function is invoked. These components can be modified depending on the use case.

Some of the spaCy components and their descriptions:

  • tokenizer - for segmenting text into tokens
  • tagger - Part-of-speech tagger
  • parser - dependency parser
  • ner - named entity recognizer
  • lemmatizer - for token lemmatization
  • textcat - for text classification task

The capabilities of a processing pipeline always depend on the components, their models, and how they were trained. Each spaCy pipeline has two attributes:

  1. pipe_names
  2. pipeline(name ,component)

To view the spaCy pipeline attributes can be achieved by inspecting the pipeline

# import spacy
import spacy

# Load the en_core_web_sm pipeline
nlp = spacy.load("en_core_web_sm")

# Print the names of the pipeline components
print("pipeline name", nlp.pipe_names)

print("============================================================================")

# Print the full pipeline of (name, component) tuples
print("pipeline tuples", nlp.pipeline)

Output

pipeline name ['tok2vec', 'tagger', 'parser', 'attribute_ruler', 'lemmatizer', 'ner']
============================================================================
pipeline tuples [('tok2vec', <spacy.pipeline.tok2vec.Tok2Vec object at 0x7fd65b7407d0>), ('tagger', <spacy.pipeline.tagger.Tagger object at 0x7fd65b78c650>), ('parser', <spacy.pipeline.dep_parser.DependencyParser object at 0x7fd65ba55b40>), ('attribute_ruler', <spacy.pipeline.attributeruler.AttributeRuler object at 0x7fd65b70b3c0>), ('lemmatizer', <spacy.lang.en.lemmatizer.EnglishLemmatizer object at 0x7fd65b6c6500>), ('ner', <spacy.pipeline.ner.EntityRecognizer object at 0x7fd65ba55de0>)]

spaCy Custom Components: spaCy provide a way of customizing component depending on the use cases at hand, but require to follow two guidelines in order to solve challenges with custom components:

  1. Computing your own values based on tokens and their attributes
  2. Adding named entities, for example, based on a dictionary

Let's see how to apply custom components

The first step is to define custom components using functions and then add the custom components on the spaCy pipeline.

How about adding digits extractor components in the spaCy pipeline?  Yes, Let's do it.

First, let's define a component for extracting digits from documents as a function named  digit_component_function

digit_component_function  will accept the spaCy object doc, then convert the object into a string from the string we can extract all digits contained in the spaCy document, then finally our function will return the doc object.

The final task is to add digit_component_function in the spaCy pipeline.

Here are the full codes for adding custom digit components in spaCy

# import spaCy
import spacy
from spacy.language import Language

# Define the custom component
@Language.component("digit_component")
def digit_component_function(doc):
  # convert object to string
  txt = str(doc)
  # extract digits from the string
  print("This document contain the following digits:",[int(s) for s in txt.split() if s.isdigit()])
  # Return the doc
  return doc

# Load the small English pipeline
nlp = spacy.load("en_core_web_sm")

# Add the component first in the pipeline and print the pipe names
nlp.add_pipe("digit_component", first=True)
print(nlp.pipe_names)

# Process a text
text = "XLnet outperforms BERT on 20 tasks, often by a large margin. The new model achieves state-of-the-art performance on 18 NLP tasks including question answering,natural language inference, sentiment analysis,etc"
doc = nlp(text)

Output

'digit_component', 'tok2vec', 'tagger', 'parser', 'attribute_ruler', 'lemmatizer', 'ner']
This document contain the following digits: [20, 18]

spaCy Custom Attributes:  spaCy provide a way of extentending attributes depending on the use cases at hand, there are two ways to perform this task:-

  1. Attribute extensions – Set a default value that can be overwritten
  2. Property extensions – Work like properties in Python. Define a getter and an optional setter function

Custom attributes are available via ._ property. This is done to distinguish them from the built-in attributes. Attributes need to be registered with the Doc,Tokenor Spanclasses using the set_extensionmethod.

Let's try to extend with our own attributes for the country we are living in. using set_extension method we should add is_country attributes. Then after we can inspect the attribute that we have added using  _.attributename.

# import spacy
import spacy
from spacy.tokens import Token

nlp = spacy.blank("en")

# Register the Token extension attribute "is_country" with the default value False
Token.set_extension("is_country", default=False)

# Process the text and set the is_country attribute to True for the token "Tanzania"
doc = nlp("I live in Tanzania.")
doc[3]._.is_country = True

# Print the token text and the is_country attribute for all tokens
print([(token.text, token._.is_country) for token in doc])

Output

[('I', False), ('live', False), ('in', False), ('Tanzania', True), ('.', False)]

Wow! now you are familiar with how to work with the spaCy pipelines, you can opt to go far with it by looking at components with extension, Entity extractions, scaling & performance, selective processing, etc

Thank you for taking part by reading this article, please share with the community.
item.author: tonyloyt

item.title: SharePoint Online 中的租户应用程序目录与网站集应用程序目录 | Tenant App Catalog vs Site Collection App Catalog in SharePoint Online
item.description:
部署的包对所有网站集都可见。
随着网站集应用程序目录的引入，租户管理员可以在选定的站点中启用应用程序目录。 启用后，网站集管理员可以打包部署到该特定网站集中。

让我们比较一下租户应用程序目录和网站集应用程序目录

租户应用目录网站集应用程序目录
可用性租户中的所有站点仅选定的网站集
谁可以部署租户管理员网站集管理员
何时使用限制使用 SharePoint Online 命令行管理程序进行配置和管理
安全租户管理员可以选择验证所有正在部署的应用程序网站集管理员可以选择验证所有正在部署的应用程序。 尽管已安装的解决方案只能在特定站点中使用，但它们可能会访问租户中其他站点的资源

启用网站集应用程序目录
在“SharePoint Online Management Shell”中运行以下命令

Connect-SPOService -Url https://<site name>-admin.sharepoint

提示时输入您的租户管理员凭据

Add-SPOSiteCollectionAppCatalog -Site https://<site name>.sharepoint.com/sites/DemoAppCatalog

此命令将在“DemoAppCatalog”站点中创建一个应用程序目录，如下图所示

将应用程序部署到网站集应用程序目录

  1. 导航到已启用应用程序目录的网站集的网站内容页面
  2. 单击“SharePoint 应用程序”列表
  3. 将您的自定义解决方案 .sppkg 或 .app 文件上传到库
  4. 如果它是 .sppkg，您将收到一个提示，询问您是否信任该解决方案以及您是否愿意“使该解决方案可用于组织中的所有站点”。 确保选中此选项，然后单击部署。

禁用网站集应用程序目录
在“SharePoint Online Management Shell”中运行以下命令

Connect-SPOService -Url https://<site name>-admin.sharepoint

提示时输入您的租户管理员凭据

Remove-SPOSiteCollectionAppCatalog -Site https://<site name>.sharepoint.com/sites/DemoAppCatalog

执行此脚本后，SharePoint 应用程序库仍将显示在您的网站集中，但您将无法部署或使用其中部署的任何解决方案。

快乐编码😉



原文:

Tenant App Catalog in SharePoint Online is the central place for managing all your SharePoint Apps/add-ins and SPFx solutions. The deployed packages are visible to all site collections.
With the introduction of Site Collection App Catalogs, tenant administrators can enable app catalogs in selected sites. Once enabled site collection admin can deploy packaged into that particular site collection.

Let’s compare the Tenant App Catalog & Site Collection App Catalogs

Tenant App Catalog Site Collection App Catalog
Availability All the sites in the tenant Only selected site collection
Who can deploy Tenant Administrator Site Collection Administrator
When to use - Manage the apps centrally
- Have apps available globally		 - Try-out apps- Apps are specific to a site collection

- Developing an App and want to make sure that app is only available in a specific site
Limitations - Configure and manage using the SharePoint Online Management Shell
Security Tenant Administrator has the option to verify all the apps being deployed Site Collection Administrator has the option to verify all the apps being deployed. Although solutions installed, can be used only in a particular site, they can potentially access resources from other sites in the tenant

Enable Site Collection App Catalog
Run the following commands in "SharePoint Online Management Shell"

Connect-SPOService -Url https://<site name>-admin.sharepoint

When prompt enter your tenant administrator credentials

Add-SPOSiteCollectionAppCatalog -Site https://<site name>.sharepoint.com/sites/DemoAppCatalog

This command will create a App Catalog in "DemoAppCatalog" site as shown in the below image

Deploy Apps into Site Collection App Catalog

  1. Navigate to the Site Contents page of the Site Collection you have enabled app catalog
  2. Click on the “Apps for SharePoint” list
  3. Upload your custom solution .sppkg or .app file to the library
  4. If its a .sppkg, You’ll get a prompt asking if you trust the solution and if you would like to “Make this solution available to all sites in the organization”. Make sure to check this option and then click Deploy.

Disable Site Collection App Catalog
Run the following commands in "SharePoint Online Management Shell"

Connect-SPOService -Url https://<site name>-admin.sharepoint

When prompt enter your tenant administrator credentials

Remove-SPOSiteCollectionAppCatalog -Site https://<site name>.sharepoint.com/sites/DemoAppCatalog

After executing this script, the Apps for SharePoint library will be still visible in your site collection, but you will not be able to deploy or use any solutions deployed in it.

Happy Coding 😉
item.author: chindara

item.title: 为您的 Web 应用程序外包 .NET 开发人员的主要原因 | Top Reasons to Outsource .NET Developer for Your Web Apps
item.description:
作为一名业务人员，当您考虑为任何业务开发企业 Web 应用程序时，为开发过程选择合适的技术集非常重要，并且您的开发方法应该是创新的。 我们都知道，企业应用程序的架构会很复杂，而且企业应用程序需要一些先进的技术和功能。

企业应用程序开发最重要的部分之一是开发强大的后端。 强大的后端可以为业务创造奇迹。 我并不是说设计和 UI 不那么重要，但如果后端不能很好地支持它，那么要打动你的目标受众将是一个挑战。

您可以使用 .NET 开发和大多数企业运行的点网开发来开发强大的后端。 因此，今天我们将讨论为什么 .NET 开发很重要，为什么外包网络开发人员更好，以及网络开发人员如何使您受益。

因此，如果您正在寻找开发具有复杂性的企业应用程序，请继续阅读本文，您将了解为什么 .NET 框架将是您的正确选择。

正如你们都知道的那样，我不想详细介绍 .NET，例如对于服务器端编程，它是常用的平台，不仅用于 Web 应用程序，而且还用于跨平台和窗口应用程序。

开始吧

为什么 - .NET 用于 Web 应用程序开发？

高度可扩展

当您即将决定 Web 框架时，无疑您必须考虑框架的可扩展性。 您还可以使用 .NET 向您的应用程序添加不同的功能。

速度

我喜欢 dotnet 最令人印象深刻的一点是它提供了一个简单的用户界面。 使用 .NET 开发过程，您可以轻松地在各种组件之间导航，它使 .NET 开发人员可以完全控制他们的开发过程。

因此，使用 .NET 框架，您将立即获得快速开发，如果您希望使用 .NET 框架开发您的业务应用程序，请从外包公司外包网络开发人员并聘请 .NET 开发人员进行业务应用程序开发。

代码可重用性

代码可重用性 - 开发人员喜爱 .NET 的因素以及开发人员更喜欢 .NET 框架的原因。 是的 .NET 框架允许开发人员在开发过程中使用相同的代码来开发不同的模块。

这将节省开发人员在开发过程中的大量时间，因为开发人员在尝试在应用程序中添加新功能时不再需要从头开始编写代码。 因此，当您的开发时间减少时，肯定会降低开发成本。

并且由于.NET 框架还可以用于跨平台应用程序开发，因为.NET 支持代码可重用性。

资源可用性

当您为您的企业应用程序开发过程选择 .NET 框架时，您将可以访问广泛的资源。 它已成为最受信任和流行的后端框架。 您将获得大量有才华的 .NET 开发人员，并且可以方便地为您的企业应用程序开发聘请 .NET 开发人员。

为什么 - 外包 NET 开发人员

至此，我们已经了解了为什么 .NET 框架是企业应用程序开发的最佳选择，现在让我们知道为什么应该外包 .NET 开发人员，而不是为内部团队聘请 .NET 程序员。

成本在每个开发过程中都扮演着重要的角色，每个公司都希望降低开发成本。 而对于小型企业和初创公司来说，降低开发成本更为重要，在这种情况下，您可以外包和聘请点网开发人员来降低开发成本。
外包 NET 开发人员对您来说至关重要，不仅可以节省您的开发成本，还可以节省您的开发成本，而且您不需要保留办公空间和任何可能为您的内部团队带来的额外费用。

外包市场一直在增长，您将在全球各地获得才华横溢且知识渊博的开发人员。 印度是 ​​IT 中心之一，拥有经验丰富且技术娴熟的开发人员，可帮助您发展业务并达到预期结果。

当您外包网络开发人员时，您对专业知识有很高的期望。 这些开发人员肯定拥有这种专业知识。

每个离岸开发公司都遵循经过时间考验的方法来进行 Web 开发。 离岸开发公司的主要目标是不拖延地按时交付项目。

离岸开发人员具有处理许多不同类型的项目和许多复杂项目的经验。 因此，他们知道如何在给定的时间内完成复杂的任务。 离岸开发公司遵循敏捷开发方法来满足每一个需求。

无论您拥有哪个级别的业务，您甚至都不应该损害您的核心业务目标。 而且您更清楚现在世界的竞争有多激烈，只要您将目光从核心业务目标上移开，事情就会开始出错。

因此，当您从离岸开发公司外包网络开发人员时。 您将有足够的时间专注于您的核心业务目标。

结论

我在此结束时得出的一个基本结论是，如果您正在寻找开发动态业务应用程序，.NET 框架应该始终是您的首选。

不仅适用于动态企业应用程序，而且如果您想开发跨平台的应用程序，您可以使用 .NET 框架并可以为您的应用程序开发所有必需的特性和功能。 如果您正在寻找开发您的企业应用程序或跨平台应用程序，请雇用 .NET 开发人员并立即开始您的应用程序开发的轰动一时的旅程。



原文:

Being a Business person, when you think of developing an enterprise web application for any business, it is important to select the proper set of technologies for the development process and your development approach should be innovative. We all know that the architecture will be complex in the enterprise application and also the enterprise application requires some advanced technologies and functionalities.

One of the most important parts of enterprise application development is to develop the strong back-end. Strong backend could do wonders for business. I am not saying that designing and UI are less important but If backend does not support it well then it will be challenging to impress your target audience.

And you can develop a strong backend with the .NET development and most enterprise runs of dot net development. So, today we are going to have a discussion on why .NET development is important and why it is better to outsource net developer and how net developer will benefit you.

So, if you are looking for developing enterprise applications with complexities, go ahead in the article and you will get to know why .NET framework will be a right choice for you.

I don’t want to go in much detail about the .NET as you all are aware of it, like for the server side programming it is commonly used platform and not only for the web application but it is also used for the cross platform and windows application.

Let’s start

Why - .NET for Web App Development?

Highly Scalable

When you are about to decide the web framework, undoubtedly you must have to think about the Scalability of the framework. And .NET supported frameworks such as .NET core and ASP.NET are the high scalability framework and as per the need of the business, it helps organizations to expand.

.NET has many built-in scalability features which help you to manage the session and event in your development process. You can also add different functionality to your application with .NET.

Speed

One of the most impressive things I like about the dotnet is that it offers a straightforward user-interface. With the .NET development process, you easily navigate between various components and it gives .NET developers full control over their development process.

So, with .NET framework, you will get fast development without any delay and if you wish to develop your business applications with .NET framework then outsource net developer from outsourcing company and hire .net developer for your business applications development.

Code Reusability

Code Reusability - factor that is loved by developers about the .NET and reason why developers prefer .NET framework. Yes .NET framework allows developers to use the same code for the development of the different modules in the development process.

It will save lots of time of the developer in the development process as developers no longer require to write code from scratch whenever they try to add a new feature in the application. So, when your development time is reduced, it will surely reduce the development cost.

And as .NET framework can also be used for the cross platform application development as .NET supports code reusability.

Resource Availability

You will get access to wide resources when you choose .NET framework for your enterprise application development process. It has become the most trusted and popular backend framework. You will get lots of talented .NET developers and it is convenient for you to Hire .NET developer for your enterprise application development.

Why - Outsource NET Developer

Upto here we have seen why .NET framework is the best choice for the enterprise application development, Now let's know why you should outsource .NET developer and do not go to hire .NET programmers for in-housing team.

1. Save Development Cost

Cost plays an important role in every development process and every company wants to reduce the cost of development. And for small enterprises and startups, it is more important to reduce the development cost and in the case, you can outsource and Hire dot net developer to reduce development cost.
Outsource NET Developer can be crucial for you and save your development cost not only in terms of the salary but also you do not require to keep the office space and any additional charges that can be cost you for your in-housing team.

2. Better Expertise

Outsourcing market has been growing and you will get talented and knowledgeable developers everywhere in the globe. India being one of the IT hubs, has experienced and skilled developers which help you to grow your business and meet the desired results.

And you have high expectations of expertise when you outsource net developer. Those developers have that expertise for sure.

3. Timely Delivery

Every offshore development company works with web development by following a time-tested approach. The main aim of offshore development companies is to deliver the project on time without any delay.

Offshore developers have the experience of working with many different types of projects and many complex projects. So, they know how to complete the complex tasks within the given time. offshore development companies follow Agile development methodology to meet every requirement.

4. Focus on Core Business Objectives

No matter which level of business you are having, you never even should compromise your core business objectives. And you know it better that how competitive the world is now, just you take your eyes off the core business objectives and things can start going wrong.

So, when you outsource net developer from an offshore development company. You will get enough time to focus on your core business goals.

Conclusion

I ended here with the one liner conclusion that if you are looking for developing a dynamic business application, .NET framework should be your first choice always.

Not only for dynamic enterprise applications but if you want to develop the application for cross-platform, you can use .NET framework and can develop all the required features and functionality to your application. If you are looking to develop your enterprise application or cross platform application, Hire .NET Developer and start your blockbuster journey of application development today.
item.author: stevend2212

item.title: 使用 Snack Bars、进度指示器和警报对话框改善 Flutter 的用户体验 | Improve User Experience in Flutter With Snack Bars, Progress Indicators, and Alert Dialog
item.description:
介绍

欢迎来到另一个激动人心的博客，这是Flutter应用开发教程系列的第 8 部分。 所以，到目前为止，我们制作了Splash Screen ，一些全局小部件，如应用栏和底部导航栏，并且还实现了全局主题。 在最后两节中，我们创建了UI并编写了用于 Firebase 项目的注册和登录方法的后端。 在本节中，我们将使用 Flutter 中的功能向用户提供视觉反馈。

您可以从这里找到源代码。

在注册/登录期间显示进度指示器

前往auth_state_provider.dart类并进行一些更改。

在类之外创建一个枚举，以切换应用程序进程状态状态。

 // Outside of any class or function // Make an enum to togggle progrss indicator enum ProcessingState { done, waiting, }

在 Provider 类中，让我们创建一个ProcessingState类型的字段和一个切换这些值/状态的函数。

 ProcessingState _processingState = ProcessingState.done; // getter ProcessingState get processingState => _processingState; void setPrcState(ProcessingState prcsState) { _processingState = prcsState; notifyListeners(); }

我们将在应用程序繁忙时显示 CircularProgressIndicator 并在完成时将其删除。 例如，按下注册/登录按钮后，我们可以显示进度指示器来代替按钮，然后在 firebase 发送响应时将其移除。

所以，让我们首先在 register 函数中添加函数。 在此之后，我们将在 auth_form_widget.dart 文件中进行更改。

更新寄存器函数中的处理状态

// Our Function will take email,password, username and buildcontext void register(String email, String password, String username, BuildContext context) async { // Start loading progress indicator once submit button is hit // #1 setPrcState(ProcessingState.waiting); try { // Get back usercredential future from createUserWithEmailAndPassword method UserCredential userCred = await authInstance .createUserWithEmailAndPassword(email: email, password: password); // Save username name await userCred.user!.updateDisplayName(username); // After that access "users" Firestore in firestore and save username, email and userLocation await FirebaseFirestore.instance .collection('users') .doc(userCred.user!.uid) .set( { 'username': username, 'email': email, 'userLocation': null, }, ); // if everything goes well user will be registered and logged in // now go to the homepage GoRouter.of(context).goNamed(APP_PAGE.home.routeName); } on FirebaseAuthException catch (e) { // In case of error // if email already exists if (e.code == "email-already-in-use") { print("The account with this email already exists."); } if (e.code == 'weak-password') { // If password is too weak print("Password is too weak."); } // #2 setPrcState(ProcessingState.done); } catch (e) { // For anything else print("Something went wrong please try again."); // #3 setPrcState(ProcessingState.done); } // notify listeneres notifyListeners(); }
  1. 在注册函数中，我们将在 Try 块之前开始将 ProcessState 切换为等待（默认情况下已完成）。
  2. 我们不会在 try 块的末尾将其切换回来，因为如果成功，我们将进入下一页并显示一个 Snackbar，我们将在本节之后实现它。

请自行对登录和注销功能进行类似更改。

现在，我们需要告诉应用程序，当处理状态处于等待状态时，显示进度指示器，然后在处理状态完成后移除指示器。 为此，让我们转到auth_form_widget.dart 。 在我们实例化 AuthStateProvider 之后，立即创建一个 ProcessState 类型的新变量，其值等于 AuthStateProvider 的进程状态的值。

 Widget build(BuildContext context) { final AuthStateProvider authStateProvider = Provider.of<AuthStateProvider>(context); // make new ProcessState var ProcessingState prcState = authStateProvider.processingState;

之后，在我们有海拔按钮的地方，让我们让它成为一个有条件的渲染小部件。

 if (prcState == ProcessingState.waiting) const CircularProgressIndicator(), if (prcState == ProcessingState.done) Row( mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.end, children: [ TextButton( onPressed: () {}, child: const Text('Cancel'), ), const SizedBox( width: 20, ), ElevatedButton( onPressed: () { // call _submitForm on tap _submitForm(authStateProvider, context); }, child: Text(registerAuthMode ? 'Register' : 'Sign In'), style: ButtonStyle( elevation: MaterialStateProperty.all(8.0), ), ), ], ),

这样，进度指示器将在正确的时间激活和停用。

在 Snackbar 上显示信息

如前所述，我们将使用Snackbar显示“身份验证成功”、“欢迎回来”等信息。为此，让我们再次在 AuthStateProvider 类上创建一个简单的函数。

 // Right after setPrcState function // create function to handle popups SnackBar msgPopUp(msg) { return SnackBar( content: Text( msg, textAlign: TextAlign.center, )); }

此函数将接收自定义消息并返回 SnackBar 以显示在屏幕上。 因此，我们将在try块操作结束时，也就是在调用 GoRouter 之前，在ScaffoldMessenger.of(context)中传递这个 msgPopUp 方法。

内部注册功能

ScaffoldMessenger.of(context) .showSnackBar(msgPopUp("The account has been registered.")); // Before GoRouter GoRouter.of(context).goNamed(APP_PAGE.home.routeName);

内部登录功能

 ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(msgPopUp("Welcome Back"));

这样，当身份验证操作成功时，用户将在应用程序底部看到一个快餐栏。

使用警报对话框的身份验证警报错误

小吃店很有用，因为它巧妙地显示了短消息。 但是，由于它的微妙性，在出错的情况下使用它并不是很合适。 在这种情况下，最好使用对话框弹出窗口（例如AlertDialog小部件）来提醒用户。 因此，在 msgPopUp 函数之后，让我们创建另一个函数。

 // #1 AlertDialog errorDialog(BuildContext context, String errMsg) { return AlertDialog( title: Text("Error", style: TextStyle( //text color will be red // #2 color: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.error, )), content: Text(errMsg, style: TextStyle( //text color will be red // #3 color: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.error, )), actions: [ TextButton( // On button click remove the dialog box // #2 onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(), child: const Text('OK'), ), ], ); }
  1. 我们的方法将接受两个参数：错误消息和构建上下文。
  2. 我们的警报框将包含红色的文本。
  3. 单击后，对话框将从屏幕上删除。 这里需要构建上下文来调用Navigator.pop方法。

在注册和登录方法上，我们只打印错误消息。 现在，让我们用 errorDialog() 替换那些打印语句，并将相同的消息传递给函数。

内部寄存器函数的 Catch 块

on FirebaseAuthException catch (e) { // In case of error // if email already exists if (e.code == "email-already-in-use") { showDialog( context: context, builder: (context) => errorDialog( context, "The account with this email already exists.")); } if (e.code == 'weak-password') { // If password is too weak showDialog( context: context, builder: (context) => errorDialog(context, "Password is too weak.")); } setPrcState(ProcessingState.done); } catch (e) { // For anything else showDialog( context: context, builder: (context) => errorDialog(context, "Something went wrong please try again.")); setPrcState(ProcessingState.done); }

这就是盒子的样子。

请自行将这些警报添加到您的登录方法中。

概括

在 AuthStateProvider 和 AuthFormWidget 类中进行了一些更改。

  1. 我们创建了一个 Enum 来处理进程状态。
  2. 根据处理状态实施进度指标。
  3. 构建了一个简单的小吃店功能，用于在身份验证成功时为用户显示信息。
  4. 创建了一个错误处理程序以在警报对话框上显示错误消息。

支持我们

这是一个信息丰富的博客吗？ 如果是这样，请点击“赞”按钮，向我们提出一些问题并与您的同事分享。 下一部分将介绍 App Permissions 和 Google Places API。 因此，订阅并关注我们以获取通知。

这是来自 Khadka's Coding Lounge 的 Nibesh Khadka。 我们是一家制作网站和移动应用程序的自由职业者机构。



原文:

Snack Bars, Alert Dialogs, ProgressIndicators, and similar items are very essential tools to enhance the user experience on an application regardless of platform.

Intro

Welcome to another exciting blog, this is 8th part of the series Flutter App Development Tutorial. So, far we made Splash Screen, some global widgets like the app bar and bottom nav bar, and also implemented a global theme. In the last two sections, we created UI and wrote backend for registration and sign-in methods to use with the Firebase project. In this section, we'll use features from flutters to give visual feedback to users.

You can find the source code from here.

Show Progress Indicator During Registration/Sign In

Head over to auth_state_provider.dart class and make some changes.

Create an enum outside of class, to toggle the Application Process State State.

// Outside of any class or function
// Make an enum to togggle progrss indicator
enum ProcessingState {
  done,
  waiting,
}

Inside of Provider class let's create a field of type ProcessingState and a function that switches these values/states.

  ProcessingState _processingState = ProcessingState.done;
  // getter
  ProcessingState get processingState => _processingState;

  void setPrcState(ProcessingState prcsState) {
    _processingState = prcsState;
    notifyListeners();
  }

We'll display the CircularProgressIndicator whenever the application is busy and remove it when done. For instance, after pressing the register/sign-in button we can display the progress indicator in place of the button and then remove it when firebase sends a response.

So, let's first start by adding the function inside the register function. We'll make changes inside auth_form_widget.dart files after this.

Update Processing State In Register Function

// Our Function will take email,password, username and buildcontext
  void register(String email, String password, String username,
      BuildContext context) async {
    // Start loading progress indicator once submit button is hit
    // #1
    setPrcState(ProcessingState.waiting);
    try {
      // Get back usercredential future from createUserWithEmailAndPassword method
      UserCredential userCred = await authInstance
          .createUserWithEmailAndPassword(email: email, password: password);
      // Save username name
      await userCred.user!.updateDisplayName(username);

      // After that access "users" Firestore in firestore and save username, email and userLocation
      await FirebaseFirestore.instance
          .collection('users')
          .doc(userCred.user!.uid)
          .set(
        {
          'username': username,
          'email': email,
          'userLocation': null,
        },
      );
      // if everything goes well user will be registered and logged in
      // now go to the homepage
      GoRouter.of(context).goNamed(APP_PAGE.home.routeName);
    } on FirebaseAuthException catch (e) {
      // In case of error
      // if email already exists
      if (e.code == "email-already-in-use") {
        print("The account with this email already exists.");
      }
      if (e.code == 'weak-password') {
        // If password is too weak
        print("Password is too weak.");
      }

    // #2
      setPrcState(ProcessingState.done);
    } catch (e) {
      // For anything else
      print("Something went wrong please try again.");
      // #3
      setPrcState(ProcessingState.done);
    }
    // notify listeneres
    notifyListeners();
  }
  1. In the registration function, we'll start to toggle the ProcessState to waiting(which's done by default) right before the Try block.
  2. (#2&3) We'll only switch it back to done once the servers send an error response, at the end of the Catch block. We'll not switch it back at the end of the try block because, in case of success, we'll move on to the next page as well as display a Snackbar which we'll implement after this section.

Please make similar changes to the Sign In and the Log Out functions by yourself.

Now, we'll need to tell the application, when the processing state is in waiting, display a progress indicator, and then remove the indicator once the processing state is done. To do so let's head over to auth_form_widget.dart. Right after we instantiate an AuthStateProvider, create a new variable of the type ProcessState whose value is equal to that of AuthStateProvider's process state.

 Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final AuthStateProvider authStateProvider =
        Provider.of<AuthStateProvider>(context);

    // make new ProcessState var
    ProcessingState prcState = authStateProvider.processingState;

After that, down where we have our elevation button, let's make it a conditionally rendering widget.

  if (prcState == ProcessingState.waiting) const CircularProgressIndicator(),
  if (prcState == ProcessingState.done)
              Row(
                mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.end,
                children: [
                  TextButton(
                    onPressed: () {},
                    child: const Text('Cancel'),
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(
                    width: 20,
                  ),
                  ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: () {
                      // call _submitForm on tap
                      _submitForm(authStateProvider, context);
                    },
                    child: Text(registerAuthMode ? 'Register' : 'Sign In'),
                    style: ButtonStyle(
                      elevation: MaterialStateProperty.all(8.0),
                    ),
                  ),
                ],
              ),

With this, the progress indicator will activate and deactivate at the right time.

Display Information on Snackbar

As mentioned earlier, we'll be using Snackbar to display information like "Authentication Successful", "Welcome Back", etc. To do so let's again create a simple function on AuthStateProvider class.

// Right after setPrcState function
 //  create function to handle popups
  SnackBar msgPopUp(msg) {
    return SnackBar(
        content: Text(
      msg,
      textAlign: TextAlign.center,
    ));
  }

This function will take a custom message and return a SnackBar to display on the screen. Snackbar works in conjunction with ScaffoldMessenger class. So, we'll pass this msgPopUp method in ScaffoldMessenger.of(context) at the end of the try block operations, and just before we call GoRouter.

Inside Registration Function

ScaffoldMessenger.of(context)
          .showSnackBar(msgPopUp("The account has been registered."));
// Before GoRouter
GoRouter.of(context).goNamed(APP_PAGE.home.routeName);

Inside Login Function

    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(msgPopUp("Welcome Back"));

With this when the authentication operation succeeds user will see a snack bar at the bottom of the application.

Alert Error on Authentication With Alert Dialog

The snack bar is useful because it subtly displays short messages. However, because of its subtlety, it is not very appropriate to be used in case of errors. In such cases, it's better to alert users using a dialog pop-up such as the AlertDialog widget. So, right after the msgPopUp function, let's create another function.

  // #1
  AlertDialog errorDialog(BuildContext context, String errMsg) {
    return AlertDialog(
      title: Text("Error",
          style: TextStyle(
            //text color will be red
            // #2
            color: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.error,
          )),
      content: Text(errMsg,
          style: TextStyle(
            //text color will be red
             // #3
            color: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.error,
          )),
      actions: [
        TextButton(
          // On button click remove the dialog box
           // #2
          onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(),
          child: const Text('OK'),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }
  1. Our method will take two arguments: an error message and a build context.
  2. Our alert box will have texts with the color red.
  3. On click, the dialog box will be removed from the screen. The build context is required here to call Navigator.pop method.

On both registration and sign-in methods, we are only printing the error messages. Now, let's replace those print statements with errorDialog() and pass the same messages into the function.

Inside Register Function's Catch Blocks

on FirebaseAuthException catch (e) {
      // In case of error
      // if email already exists
      if (e.code == "email-already-in-use") {
        showDialog(
            context: context,
            builder: (context) => errorDialog(
                context, "The account with this email already exists."));
      }
      if (e.code == 'weak-password') {
        // If password is too weak
        showDialog(
            context: context,
            builder: (context) =>
                errorDialog(context, "Password is too weak."));
      }
      setPrcState(ProcessingState.done);
    } catch (e) {
      // For anything else
      showDialog(
          context: context,
          builder: (context) =>
              errorDialog(context, "Something went wrong please try again."));
      setPrcState(ProcessingState.done);
    }

This is what the box will look like.

Please, add these alerts to your sign-in method by yourself.

Summary

Few changes were made in AuthStateProvider and AuthFormWidget classes.

  1. We created an Enum to address process states.
  2. Progress indicators were implemented based on Processing Status.
  3. A simple snack bar function was built to display information for users when authentication succeeds.
  4. An error handler was created to display error messages on an alert dialog box.

Support Us

Was this an informative blog? If so, hit the like button, ask us some questions and share this with your colleagues. The next part is going to be on App Permissions and Google Places API. So, subscribe and follow us to get notifications.

This is Nibesh Khadka from Khadka's Coding Lounge. We are a freelancing agency that makes websites and mobile applications.

item.title: 查找命令 | Finding commands
item.description:
发表于我正在尝试完成一个应用程序，它对我有一些提示。 第二级结束我使用他们提供的终端找到操作系统（OS）。 然后它要求使用命令识别当前工作目录。

我需要帮助来查找命令，我不确定我应该在 Java 中还是在 Linx 中查找，因为我找不到操作系统。

马可·比德曼—— May 15 5月15日



原文:

Johanna Avila

Posted on May 20

Im trying to complete an application and it has some prompts for me. 2nd level concludes of me finding the Operating System (OS) using the terminal they provided. It then asks to identify the current working directory using commands.

I need help finding the commands, im not sure if I should look in Java or in Linx bc i cant find the operating system.

Marco Biedermann - May 15
item.author: johanna_avila_92fb79cdc75

item.title: 多链的未来 | The multichain future
item.description:
建造'
在最近的市场动荡中，在 Terra、Luna 和 UST 的灾难性事件中，Mozaic 团队继续建设——为实现未来几个月的一些关键目标和计划推出而兴奋地工作。 全链现象才刚刚开始，随着我们过渡到无缝的多链未来，Mozaic 打算站在这一运动的最前沿。

你会想留下来——它会很大。

阿基米德算法
在 Mozaic，我们希望将革命性的链下技术带到加密货币和 DeFi 的最前沿。 我们通过我们称为阿基米德的基于机器学习的投资组合优化及其与全链金库的交互来做到这一点。

那么阿基米德实际上是做什么的呢？

使用代币价格和 APY 的预测指标，阿基米德定期重新平衡指数保险库中的存款。 它还将不断搜索预先批准的协议，以使用汇总资金进行耕种。 最后，阿基米德以最有效的时间间隔自动复合和切换产量农场。

阿基米德在整个农业过程中同时考虑跨链费用、滑点、TVL、网络费用和停机时间。

阿基米德的计算是在链下处理的，以确保它具有成本效益、高效和可靠——只有结果会在链上发布和实施。

在 Mozaic 的幕后，正忙于为所有用户构建一个卓越且易于使用的 DeFi 协议，是由 Greg Tanaka 带头的一支充满激情和才华横溢的开发团队。

显然，格雷格是政府及其政策的拥护者，以赶上技术进步，同时也是硅谷国会第 16 区的美国候选人。他说，“作为技术创新的坚定支持者，我相信我们不仅有责任培育这项新技术，但我们也有责任将其融入我们的社会。

我们祝愿格雷格在他的努力中一切顺利。 使用 Chainlink 启动
因此，Mozaic 团队已开始接受顶级加密货币服务提供商（ALCHEMY、BLOCKDAEMON、CERAMIC、THE GRAPH 等）的帮助，获得经验丰富的个人的专家指导和实践支持，并获得专业资源涵盖扩展、运营和行业最佳实践。 这种伙伴关系将确保 Mozaic 在可预见的未来能够获得必要的工具、基础设施和知识。

阿基米德的初步测试也取得了一些非常有希望的结果。 例如，一个测试组合在两周内接受了阿基米德的决定。 在那段时间里，该投资组合设法净赚了大约 15% 的 APY。 相比之下，在同一时期，使用相同农场但未使用阿基米德的相同测试组合获得了负回报。

不和谐 | 推特 | 电报公告 | 马赛克金融

风险警告：投资任何加密货币都存在重大风险，并可能导致您的资金完全损失。 你永远不应该投资超过你能承受的损失。 在投资之前，请确保您完全了解所涉及的所有风险。 还请考虑您的经验水平和风险承受能力，甚至寻求独立的财务和法律建议。 您有责任根据您所在国家/地区和/或适用司法管辖区的法律和监管要求确定是否允许您使用 Mozaic 的服务。



原文:

Buildin’
tldr: ground breaking technology, unparalleled team.

In the midst of the recent market turmoil, among the cataclysmic events of Terra, Luna and UST, the Mozaic team continues to build — excitedly working towards a number of key objectives and planned launches for the coming months. The omnichain phenomenon has only just begun and Mozaic intends to be at the forefront of this movement as we transition into a seamless, multi-chain future.

You’re going to want to stick around — it’s going to be big.

The Archimedes Algorithm
At Mozaic, we wanted to bring revolutionary off-chain technology to the forefront of cryptocurrency and DeFi. We do this through our machine learning-based portfolio optimization we call Archimedes and its interaction with the omnichain vaults.

So what does Archimedes actually do?

Using predictive metrics of token price and APY, Archimedes periodically rebalances deposits in the index vaults. It will also continually search pre-approved protocols to farm with aggregated funds. Finally, Archimedes automatically compounds and switches yield farms at the most efficient intervals.

Archimedes considers cross-chain fees, slippage, TVL, network fees and downtime concurrently throughout the entire farming process.

The computation for Archimedes is handled off-chain to ensure it is cost effective, efficient and reliable — only the results are published and implemented on chain.

Mozaic Development Team
Behind the curtain of Mozaic, busy building a distinguished and easy-to-use DeFi protocol for all users, lies a passionate and brilliant team of developers, spearheaded by Greg Tanaka.

Greg has been featured recently in Cointelegraph as a ‘legislator for the digital age and possibly the most pro-crypto person running in this election cycle.’ Evidently, Greg is an advocate for the government and their policies to catch up with technological advancements while simultaneously being a US Candidate for Silicon Valley Congressional District 16. He says that, ‘As a firm supporter of tech innovation, I believe that we not only have a responsibility to cultivate this new technology but we also have a responsibility to integrate it into our society.’

We wish Greg all the best in his endeavors. Everyone from Mozaic will be closely following and championing their support for Greg!

Startup with Chainlink
The team at Mozaic has also begun to enjoy the support from the initiative, Startup with Chainlink.

As a result, the Mozaic team has started to receive assistance from the top cryptocurrency service providers (ALCHEMY, BLOCKDAEMON, CERAMIC, THE GRAPH and more), had expert guidance and hands-on support from experienced individuals and been given access to specialized resources that cover scaling, operations and industry best practices. This partnership will ensure Mozaic has access to the necessary tools, infrastructure and knowledge for the foreseeable future.

Alpha
Initial tests for Archimedes have also netted some very promising results. For example, a test portfolio was subjected to the decisions of Archimedes over a two week period. Over that time, the portfolio managed to net approximately 15% APY. Comparatively over the same period, the same test portfolio that utilized the same farms but did not use Archimedes, netted negative returns.

Mozaic is an omnichain protocol that empowers DeFi users by continuously searching for the most capital efficient multi-chain yield farming opportunities and automating the process. Mozaic removes the guesswork from the simple, yet complex question of; “Where can I stake my tokens to achieve the highest return?” — streamlining the DeFi experience for the end user while providing the most competitive yield-bearing strategies in the industry.

Discord | Twitter | Telegram Announcements | Mozaic Finance

Risk Warning: Investing in any cryptocurrency carries significant risks and can result in the complete loss of your capital. You should never invest more than you can afford to lose. Before investing, ensure that you completely comprehend all the risks involved. Please also consider your level of experience and risk tolerance, and even seek independent financial and legal advice. It is your responsibility to determine whether you are permitted to use the services of Mozaic based on the legal and regulatory requirements of your country of residence and/or applicable jurisdiction(s).
